zh: 科学家认为地球上的生命已经存在了数百万年。
en: Scientists think that there has been life on earth for millions of years.

zh: 然而，我们尚未在其他行星上发现生命。
en: However, we haven't found life on other planets yet.

zh: 地球是一颗行星，它围绕太阳运行。
en: The earth is a planet and it goes around the sun.

zh: 还有另外七颗行星也围绕太阳运行。
en: And there are seven other planets that also go around the sun.

zh: 太阳及其行星被称为太阳系。
en: The sun and its planets are called the solar system.

zh: 太阳系是宇宙的一小部分。
en: The solar system is a small part of the universe.

zh: 科学家已经发射了许多宇宙飞船来探索太阳系中的其他行星。
en: Scientists have launched many spaceships to explore other planets in the solar system.

zh: 一些宇宙飞船已经飞出了太阳系。
en: Some spaceships have gone beyond the solar system.

zh: 然而，还没有人在太空中发现任何生命。
en: However, no one has discovered any life in space yet.

zh: 为什么没有来自其他行星的人给我们发送信息？
en: Why has no one from other planets sent us a message?

zh: 他们尝试过向我们发送信息吗？
en: Have they tried to send information to us?

zh: 太空中有如此多的恒星，我们是孤独的，还是太空中其他行星上存在生命？
en: With so many stars in space, are we alone, or is there life on other planets in space?

zh: 我们的国家发展迅速。
en: Our country has developed rapidly.

zh: 嗨，简！你暑假过得愉快吗？
en: Hi, Jane! Did you have a good summer holiday?

zh: 还不错。丽塔，你刚从你的家乡回来。你的旅行怎么样？
en: Not bad. Rita, you have just come back from your hometown. How was your trip?

zh: 太棒了！我去了印度我家附近的许多地方。那里发生了巨大的变化，我的家乡变得越来越美丽。
en: Great! I went to many places near my home in India. Great changes have taken place there and my hometown has become more and more beautiful.

zh: 你去过哪里，简？
en: Where have you been, Jane?

zh: 我和我的父母去过黄山。那是一个美丽的地方。有那么多不同种类的树和岩石，以至于我很难选择拍哪些照片。
en: I have been to Mount Huang with my parents. It's a beautiful place. There were so many kinds of trees and rocks that it was difficult for me to choose to take photos.

zh: 你去过哪里，康康？
en: And where have you been, Kangkang?

zh: 我去过延安看望我的祖父。
en: I have been to Yan'an to visit with my grandfather.

zh: 顺便问一下，玛丽亚在哪里？
en: By the way, where's Maria?

zh: 她去古巴当志愿者了，她明天就会回来。
en: She has gone to Cuba to be a volunteer and she will be back tomorrow.

zh: 听！铃声响了。
en: Listen! There goes the bell.

zh: A: 你去过哪里？
en: A: Where have you been?

zh: B: 我去过黄山。
en: B: I have been to Mount Huang.

zh: A: 她去古巴了。
en: A: She has gone to Cuba.

zh: 她还在那里，明天回来。
en: She is still there and will be back tomorrow.

zh: 嗨，玛丽亚！我好久没见到你了。
en: Hi, Maria! I haven't seen you for a long time.

zh: 你暑假参加了一些志愿者活动，是吗？
en: You took part in some volunteer activities during the summer holidays, didn't you?

zh: 是的。我在一家残疾儿童之家做志愿者。
en: Yes. I was a volunteer in a disabled children's home.

zh: 酷！你为残疾儿童打扫房间了吗？
en: Cool! Did you clean rooms for the disabled children?

zh: 不，我没有。但我为他们做饭了。
en: No, I didn't. But I cooked for them.

zh: 我从中学到了很多。
en: I've learnt a lot from it.

zh: 我认为帮助他人让我感到快乐。
en: I think it makes me happy to help others.

zh: 你去过其他地方吗？
en: Have you been to any other place?

zh: 虽然我没有时间去旅行，但我仍然感到非常快乐。
en: Though I had no time to travel, I still felt very happy.

zh: 我去过延安和我爷爷一起参观。
en: I have been to Yan'an to visit with my grandfather.

zh: 而且我在那里还交了一些新朋友。
en: And I also made some new friends there.

zh: 太棒了！多么有意义的假期啊！
en: Great! What a meaningful holiday!

zh: 为了这份报告，我采访了我的奶奶关于北京的生活。
en: For this report I have interviewed my grandmother about the life in Beijing.

zh: 她在这里住了60多年，目睹了许多变化。
en: She has lived here for over 60 years and has seen a lot of changes.

zh: 回到20世纪60年代，情况很困难。
en: Back in the 1960s, things were difficult.

zh: 道路很窄，没有很多环路。
en: The roads were narrow and there weren't many ring roads.

zh: 家庭住在小房子里，人们彼此非常亲近。
en: Families lived in small houses, and people were very close to each other.

zh: 几乎所有的孩子都能上学，但他们没有很多书可读。
en: Almost all children could go to school but they did not have a lot of books to read.

zh: 人们可以去看医生，药品很便宜，但那时没有很多好药。
en: People could go to see a doctor, and the medicines were very cheap but there were not many good medicines back then.

zh: 人们主要通过信件或电报与远方的朋友和亲戚保持联系。
en: People kept in touch with their friends and relatives far away mainly by letter or telegram.

zh: 自改革开放以来，中国发展迅速。
en: China has developed rapidly since the reform and opening-up.

zh: 越来越多的环路和地铁出现了，北京的建筑物也变得越来越高、越来越明亮。
en: More and more ring roads and subways have appeared and buildings in Beijing are becoming taller and brighter.

zh: 人们的生活条件改善了很多。
en: People's living conditions have improved a lot.

zh: 并且有更多种类的食物和衣服来满足人们的需求。
en: And there are more kinds of food and clothes to satisfy people's needs.

zh: 孩子们不仅可以在现代化的学校里学习，还可以在互联网上学习。
en: Children can study not only in modern schools but also on the internet.

zh: 人们可以享受到良好的医疗保健。
en: People can enjoy good medical care.

zh: 更重要的是，通讯变得越来越容易和快捷——人们可以使用电话、手机、传真机和互联网。
en: What's more, communications are becoming easier and quicker — people can use telephones, cellphones, fax machines and the internet.

zh: 北京取得了迅速的进步，并且已经成功举办了2008年奥运会。
en: Beijing has made rapid progress and it has already succeeded in hosting the 2008 Olympic Games.

zh: 我认为记住过去、活在当下、梦想未来是很重要的。
en: I think it is important to remember the past, live in the present and dream about the future.

zh: 休闲活动是人们在不上班或不上学时喜欢做的放松和享受的事情。
en: Leisure activities are the kinds of things people like to do to relax and enjoy themselves when they are not working or going to school.

zh: 休闲活动在人们的生活中扮演着重要的角色。
en: Leisure activities play an important part in people's lives.

zh: 过去，休闲活动很少。
en: In the past, there were few leisure activities.

zh: 孩子们经常聚在一起玩捉迷藏。
en: Children often got together to play hide-and-seek.

zh: 人们在街上聚会打牌或下棋。
en: People met to play cards or chess in the street.

zh: 很少有人有机会去旅行。
en: Few people had chances to travel.

zh: 看戏剧和听广播是他们业余时间的主要活动。
en: Watching operas and listening to the radio were the main activities in their spare time.

zh: 自从改革开放以来，中国人有更多时间花在各种休闲活动上。
en: Since the reform and opening-up, Chinese people have had more time to spend on various kinds of leisure activities.

zh: 许多人既喜欢玩也喜欢观看像篮球或足球这样的团队运动。
en: A lot of people love both to play and to watch team sports like basketball or football.

zh: 许多人呆在家里休息、看书、看电视等等。
en: Many people stay at home having a rest, reading books, watching TV and so on.

zh: 我和我的父母去过黄山。
en: I have been to Mount Huang with my parents.

zh: 她去了古巴做志愿者。
en: She has gone to Cuba to be a volunteer.

zh: 自改革开放以来，中国发展迅速。
en: China has developed rapidly since the reform and opening-up.

zh: 它已经成功举办了2008年奥运会。
en: It has already succeeded in hosting the 2008 Olympic Games.

zh: 那里发生了巨大的变化。
en: Great changes have taken place there.

zh: 我很久没见到你了。
en: I haven't seen you for a long time.

zh: 你去过其他地方吗？
en: Have you been to any other place?

zh: 虽然我没有时间去旅行，但我仍然感到非常快乐。
en: Though I had no time to travel, I still felt very happy.

zh: 我认为帮助他人使我快乐。
en: I think it makes me happy to help others.

zh: 我认为记住过去、活在当下和梦想未来是重要的。
en: I think it is important to remember the past, live in the present and dream about the future.

zh: 年轻人喜欢在网上搜索信息或聊天。
en: Young people like to search for information or chat on the internet.

zh: 近年来，越来越多的人喜欢在假期旅行。
en: In recent years, more and more people love to travel during vacation.

zh: 他们去参观一些名胜古迹，有些人甚至去国外旅游看世界。
en: They go to visit some places of interest, and some people even make a tour abroad to see the world.

zh: 中国人现在有时间和机会进行更多种类的休闲活动。
en: Chinese people now have the time and chance to do more kinds of leisure activities.

zh: 发展中国家的人口增长更快。
en: The population in developing countries is growing faster.

zh: 修改段落是培养写作技巧的好方法。
en: Correcting a passage is a good way to develop writing skills.

zh: 你好，迈克尔。我刚刚给你打过电话，但你不在。你去哪儿了？
en: Hello, Michael. I have just called you, but you weren't in. Where have you been?

zh: 我刚刚和康康去了一个购物中心。我以前从未去过那里，但我不想再去了。
en: I have just been to a shopping center with Kangkang. I've never been there before, but I don't want to go there any more.

zh: 因为人太多了。我们迷路了，找不到对方。
en: Because there were too many people. We got lost and couldn't find each other.

zh: 真倒霉！你找到他了吗？
en: Bad luck! Have you found him yet?

zh: 没有，他可能已经回家了。我们现在给他打电话吧。我真的不喜欢去那样的地方。
en: No, he has probably gone home. Let's call him up now. I really don't like going to a place like that.

zh: 嗨，康康，你在读什么？
en: Hi, Kangkang, what are you reading?

zh: 我在读一篇关于世界人口的报告。
en: I am reading a report about world population.

zh: 它说2014年世界人口有72亿。
en: It says the world has a population of 7.2 billion in 2014.

zh: 而且每年增加8200万。
en: And it is increasing by 82 million every year.

zh: 嗯，那真的很多。
en: Mmm, that's really a lot.

zh: 是的。中国人口已经达到13.6亿，印度人口有12.7亿。
en: Yes. China's population has already reached 1.36 billion, and India has a population of 1.27 billion.

zh: 美国的人口是多少？
en: What's the population of the USA?

zh: 它还说了什么？
en: What else does it say?

zh: 它还说随着人口增长，将会有更多污染和其他严重问题。
en: It also says that as the population increases, there will be more pollution and other serious problems.

zh: 那么，我们应该怎么处理这些问题？
en: So, what should we do with the problems?

zh: 有很多我们应该做的事情。
en: There are a lot of things we should do.

zh: 我们应该寻找新的方法来保护环境，例如制定新的规则和政策。
en: We should find new ways to protect the environment, for example, making new rules and policies.

zh: 只有通过共同努力，我们才能创造更美好的未来。
en: Only by working together can we create a better future.

zh: 人越多越好吗？未必。
en: The more people, the better? Not necessarily.

zh: 一些国家拥有庞大的人口。
en: Some countries have large populations.

zh: 这对这些国家来说既是好事也是坏事。
en: This has been both good and bad for these countries.

zh: 庞大的人口帮助了它们发展，但也给它们带来了一些严重的问题。
en: The large populations have helped them develop, but have caused them some serious problems as well.

zh: 由于人口众多，在一些国家，每个家庭的生活空间变少了。
en: Because of the large populations, there was less living space for each family in some countries.

zh: 更糟糕的是，许多人很难找到工作。
en: And what was worse, it was difficult for lots of people to find jobs.

zh: 与此同时，庞大的人口还引发了许多其他困难。
en: At the same time, the large population caused many other difficulties.

zh: 例如，这些国家很难提供水和能源来满足人们的日常需求。
en: For example, it was hard for the countries to supply water and energy to satisfy people's daily needs.

zh: 许多城市也更加拥挤，交通也变得更加拥堵。
en: Many cities are more crowded and the traffic is much heavier, too.

zh: 到目前为止，一些政府已经采取了许多措施来解决这些问题。
en: So far, some governments have taken many measures to solve the problems.

zh: 由于政府的努力，人们的生活条件正在迅速改善。
en: Thanks to the efforts of the governments, people's living conditions are improving rapidly.

zh: 自然环境也变得越来越好。
en: The natural environment is becoming better and better.

zh: 有时，国家人口众多是有害的。
en: Sometimes, it is bad for countries to have large populations.

zh: 首先，由于人口众多，一些人缺乏居住空间。
en: First, some people are short of living space because of large populations.

zh: 他们别无选择，只能与亲戚或朋友住在一起。
en: They have no choice but to live with their relatives or friends.

zh: 第二，没有足够的工作机会供人们选择。
en: Second, there are not enough job opportunities for people to choose from.

zh: 他们中的一些人找不到工作，而另一些人可能会失去工作。
en: Some of them can't get jobs, and some others may lose their jobs.

zh: 第三，由于乱扔垃圾，城市的街道变得更脏。
en: Third, the streets in the cities get dirtier for littering.

zh: 幸运的是，许多国家已经做出了巨大努力来处理这类问题。
en: Luckily, a number of countries have made great efforts to deal with such kinds of problems.

zh: 人们的生活条件正在改善，自然环境比以前更美丽。
en: People's living conditions are getting better and the natural environment is more beautiful than before.

zh: 大家好！我叫周雷。
en: Hello, everyone! My name is Zhou Lei.

zh: 我住在中国重庆一个叫绿色森林的小山村。
en: I live in a small mountain village called Green Forest in Chongqing, China.

zh: 我从三岁起就住在这里。
en: I have lived here since I was three.

zh: 这里住着不到600人。
en: Fewer than 600 people live here.

zh: 这个小村庄被树木环绕。
en: The small village is surrounded by trees.

zh: 空气干净清新。
en: The air is clean and fresh.

zh: 人们亲近自然，并努力保护它。
en: People live close to nature and try to protect it.

zh: 他们小心处理垃圾，并劝阻砍伐树木。
en: They are careful with garbage and discourage cutting trees.

zh: 这个村庄真的像一个大家庭。
en: The village is really like one big family.

zh: 当地人经常互相帮助，一起玩乐。
en: The local people often help each other and have fun together.

zh: 但有时很难见到朋友，因为他们住得很远。
en: But sometimes it is hard to see friends because they live so far away.

zh: 嗨，我是李明。我住在中国的首都北京。
en: Hi, I'm Li Ming. I live in Beijing, the capital of China.

zh: 我的城市有着悠久的历史和许多名胜古迹。
en: My city has a long history and many places of interest.

zh: 我们有大型购物中心和巨大的市场。
en: We have big shopping centers and huge markets.

zh: 我们的公共交通也很出色。
en: Our public transportation is excellent, too.

zh: 公交车、出租车和地铁可以带我和我的朋友去城市的任何地方。
en: Buses, taxis, and subways can take my friends and me to any part of the city.

zh: 我们可以做运动、看京剧、去电影院、吃美味的食物。
en: We can play sports, see Beijing operas, go to movie theaters, and eat delicious food.

zh: 有许多好地方，比如北海公园和天安门广场，我们可以在那里与朋友见面跳舞或听音乐。
en: There are many fine places such as Beihai Park and Tian'anmen Square where we can meet with friends to dance or listen to music.

zh: 我热爱我的北京城，因为我在这里有很多朋友，我们有很多有趣的地方可以一起去参观。
en: I love my city of Beijing because I have so many friends here and we have so many interesting places to visit together.

zh: 但现在北京庞大的人口已经引起了一些问题。
en: But now the large population in Beijing has caused some problems.

zh: 你在纽约已经待了很长时间了。你觉得那里的生活怎么样？
en: You have been in New York for a long time. How do you like living there?

zh: 很棒。我真的很喜欢。
en: It's great. I really love it.

zh: 纽约的环境怎么样？
en: What's the environment like in New York?

zh: 嗯......我听说它过去污染很严重，但自从我来到这里后，它已经改善了很多。
en: Well ... I heard that it used to be very polluted, but now it has improved a lot since I came here.

zh: 空气更清新，天空更蓝。
en: The air is fresher, and the sky is bluer.

zh: 纽约的交通怎么样？
en: How about the transportation in New York?

zh: 我喜欢乘坐公共交通工具出行，尤其是地铁。
en: I like to travel by public transportation, especially the underground.

zh: 纽约的街道非常干净，人们非常友好。
en: The streets in New York are very clean, and people are very friendly.

zh: 那太棒了！那里的生活条件怎么样？
en: That's great! How about the living conditions there?

zh: 事实上，这是一个居住的好地方。
en: As a matter of fact, it's a wonderful place to live.

zh: 在我们街区附近，有美丽的公园、好学校、著名的博物馆和很棒的餐馆。
en: Near our block, there are beautiful parks, good schools, famous museums and excellent restaurants.

zh: 如果你喜欢，你每天都可以去看戏剧、听音乐会和歌剧。
en: And you can go to plays, concerts and operas every day if you like.

zh: 你一定要来参观一下。
en: You must come for a visit.

zh: 然后你就可以亲眼看看纽约了。
en: Then you can see New York yourself.

zh: 在学习时态时，用时间轴表示过去、现在和未来是有帮助的。
en: It is helpful to express past, present and future with a time axis in learning tense.

zh: 博比从8点起/已经离开公园两个小时了。
en: Bobby has been away from the park since 8 o'clock/for two hours.

zh: 百老汇是纽约的一条街道。
en: Broadway is a street in New York.

zh: 它自1811年起就在那里了。
en: It has been there since 1811.

zh: 它过去很脏。
en: It used to be dirty.

zh: 但自20世纪20年代以来，它已经改善了。
en: But it has improved since the 1920s.

zh: 时代广场附近的区域是百老汇剧院的所在地。
en: The area near Times Square is the home of Broadway theaters.

zh: 多年来，这条街上有很多著名的剧院。
en: There have been many famous theaters along the street for many years.

zh: 许多艺术家在那里表演戏剧、音乐会和歌剧。
en: A lot of artists perform plays, concerts and operas there.

zh: 每年有数百万游客来欣赏百老汇美妙的音乐和舞蹈。
en: Every year millions of visitors come to enjoy the wonderful music and dance on Broadway.

zh: 事实上，百老汇代表着美国戏剧产业。
en: As a matter of fact, Broadway stands for the American theater industry.

zh: 简，你在读什么？
en: What are you reading, Jane?

zh: 我在读一份来自加拿大的报纸。
en: I'm reading a newspaper from Canada.

zh: 马丁给我看了一篇有趣的文章。
en: Martin showed me an interesting article.

zh: 它是关于一个帮助无家可归者的项目。
en: It is about a program that helps homeless people.

zh: 加拿大有无家可归的人吗？
en: Are there homeless people in Canada?

zh: 许多国家都有无家可归的人。
en: Many countries have homeless people.

zh: 文章说一个城市有一个很棒的项目。
en: The article says one city has a wonderful program.

zh: 自启动以来，它已经帮助了数百人重返工作岗位并过上正常生活。
en: Since it started, it has helped hundreds of people return to work and live a normal life.

zh: 他们是怎么做到的？
en: How do they manage it?

zh: 嗯，一旦他们发现有需要的人，他们就会决定合适的方式来为他们提供帮助。
en: Well, once they find people in need, they decide on suitable ways to offer them help.

zh: 无家可归的人能得到足够的食物、住所和医疗吗？
en: Can the homeless people get enough food, homes and medical treatment?

zh: 而且不仅如此。
en: And it's not only that.

zh: 该项目还为他们提供职业培训，以便他们能再次找到工作。
en: The program also provides them with job training so that they can find jobs again.

zh: 我认为让这些人自我感觉良好是很重要的。
en: I think it is important for these people to feel good about themselves.

zh: 世界已经变得更好了。
en: The world has changed for the better.

zh: 人类最基本的需求之一是家。
en: One of the most basic human needs is a home.

zh: 家是一个安全的地方。
en: A home is a safe place.

zh: 虽然世界上大多数人都珍视他们的家，但每个国家都有许多无家可归的人。
en: While most people around the world value their homes, there are many people in every country who are homeless.

zh: 有些人无家可归是短期的，因为他们从一个地方搬到另一个地方，而另一些人则无法找到一个家。
en: Some people are homeless for a short period of time because they are moving from one place to another, and other people are not able to find a home.

zh: 他们必须住在街上或庇护所里。
en: They must live on the streets or in a shelter.

zh: 无家可归的原因有很多。
en: There are many causes of homelessness.

zh: 有时人们无法保住一个家，因为他们赚不到足够的钱，或者因为他们没有工作。
en: Sometimes people can not keep a home because they do not earn enough money, or because they do not have a job.

zh: 有时人们无家可归是因为他们有毒品问题，或者因为他们有精神疾病。
en: Sometimes people are homeless because they have a problem with drugs or because they have a mental illness.

zh: 没有人是故意无家可归的。
en: No one is ever homeless on purpose.

zh: 无论无家可归的原因是什么，其影响都是一样的。
en: Whatever the cause of homelessness is, the effects are the same.

zh: 无家可归的人必须非常努力地工作才能生存。
en: Homeless people must work very hard to live.

zh: 他们无法抚养他们的孩子。
en: They can not raise their children.

zh: 有时他们必须偷食物才能吃。
en: Sometimes they must steal food just to eat.

zh: 每个国家的政府多年来一直致力于支持无家可归者，但还需要做更多的工作。
en: The government in every country has worked for many years to support the homeless but more needs to be done.

zh: 我们必须把无家可归者当作人，而不仅仅是问题。
en: We must think of the homeless as people, not just as problems.

zh: 希望工程是一个帮助学生的项目。
en: Project Hope is a program to help students.

zh: 它在中国最贫困的地区建造学校，并帮助贫困家庭负担子女的教育。
en: It builds schools in the poorest parts of China and it helps poor families afford an education for their children.

zh: 自1989年希望工程启动以来，它取得了非常好的成效。
en: Since Project Hope started in 1989, it has done very well.

zh: 到2012年，希望工程已筹集87.3亿元人民币。
en: By 2012, Project Hope had raised 8.73 billion yuan.

zh: 用这笔钱，它资助了450万名儿童上学，并建造了18,002所希望小学。
en: With this money, it aided 4.5 million children to go to schools and it built 18,002 Hope Primary Schools.

zh: 希望工程为儿童的教育和健康做出了重要贡献。
en: Project Hope has made important contributions to both the education and the health of children.

zh: 多年来，希望工程鼓励了学生的道德发展和现代思维。
en: For many years, Project Hope has encouraged the moral development and modern thinking of students.

zh: 因此，希望学校的学生尊重他们的父母、老师和同学。
en: As a result, the students in Hope schools respect their parents, their teachers, and their classmates.

zh: 敏敏来自一个贫困家庭。
en: Minmin comes from a poor family.

zh: 她得到了希望工程的帮助。
en: She has received help from Project Hope.

zh: 没有希望工程的帮助，她无法继续学业。
en: Without the help of Project Hope, she couldn't continue her studies.

zh: 希望工程改变了她的生活。
en: Project Hope changed her life.

zh: 她成为大学生已经两年了。
en: She has been a college student for two years.

zh: 大学毕业后，她将为希望工程工作。
en: After leaving the college, she will work for Project Hope.

zh: 希望工程自启动以来，已经为数百万像敏敏这样的贫困学生支付了教育费用。
en: Project Hope has paid for the education of millions of poor students like Minmin since it started.

zh: 你身边有像她这样的孩子吗？
en: Are there any children like her around you?

zh: 他们有什么困难？
en: What difficulties do they have?

zh: 希望工程可以帮助他们。
en: Project Hope can help them.

zh: 没有希望工程，许多孩子可能面临不幸福的未来。
en: Without Project Hope, there is a risk that many children would have an unhappy future.

zh: 患难见真情。
en: A friend in need is a friend indeed.

zh: 他既会说中文也会说英文。
en: He speaks Chinese and English as well.

zh: 我特意过来告诉你她发生了什么事。
en: I came up here on purpose to tell you what happened to her.

zh: 地震后，政府努力为人们提供食物和淡水。
en: After the earthquake, the government tried to provide people with food and fresh water.

zh: 多亏了这个方法，他的英语进步很大。
en: Thanks to this method, his English has improved a lot.

zh: 你暑假过得好吗？
en: Did you have a good summer holiday?

zh: 许多人在家休息、看书和看电视。
en: Many people stay at home having a rest, reading books and watching TV.

zh: 你找到他了吗？
en: Have you found him yet?

zh: 没有，他可能已经回家了。
en: No, he has probably gone home.

zh: 简，你去哪儿了？
en: Where have you been, Jane?

zh: 我和父母去了黄山。
en: I have been to Mount Huang with my parents.

zh: 如今，中国青少年有许多户外和室内活动。
en: Nowadays, Chinese teenagers have many outdoor and indoor activities.

zh: 他们有很多机会到户外去参加各种户外活动。
en: They have plenty of chances to go outside and join in all kinds of outdoor activities.

zh: 他们可以享受青少年生活的乐趣以及阳光。
en: They can enjoy the fun of teenager life as well as the sunshine.

zh: 在假期里，他们可以亲近大自然，享受它的美丽。
en: During their holidays, they may get close to nature to enjoy its beauty.

zh: 他们可以去海边游泳、晒太阳和打沙滩排球。
en: They can go to the seaside to swim in the sea, sunbathe and play beach volleyball.

zh: 他们可以去爬山，与歌唱的鸟儿共享新鲜空气。
en: They can go climbing to share fresh air with the singing birds.

zh: 有时，他们可能会出去野餐，一起玩乐。
en: Sometimes, they might go out for a picnic to have fun together.

zh: 他们也可以通过去文化公园和参观博物馆来亲近文化。
en: They can also get close to culture by going to cultural parks and visiting museums.

zh: 在空闲时间，青少年经常一起玩团队运动，比如足球和篮球。
en: In their spare time, teenagers often play team sports together, like football and basketball.

zh: 但他们的祖父母在童年时几乎没有机会做这些。
en: But their grandparents hardly had any chance to do these in their childhood.

zh: 青少年也享受许多室内活动。
en: Teenagers also enjoy many indoor activities.

zh: 他们可以在周末和朋友们开派对。
en: They can have a party with their friends at weekends.

zh: 如果他们不想出去，他们可能会上网与他人聊天。
en: If they don't want to go out, they may surf the internet to chat with others.

zh: 他们可能不出家门就观看他们最喜欢的电视节目或电影。
en: They may watch their favorite TV programs or movies without leaving their homes.

zh: 中国青少年是多么幸福啊！
en: How happy the Chinese teenagers are!

zh: 康康，我们去哪里？
en: Kangkang, where shall we go?

zh: 西山怎么样？
en: What about the West Hill?

zh: 我两年前去过那里。
en: I went there two years ago.

zh: 有几家化工厂把废水倒进小溪里。
en: There were several chemical factories pouring waste water into the stream.

zh: 我听说它已经变成了一个美丽的地方。
en: I have heard it has become a beautiful place.

zh: 那里有很多花和草。
en: There are lots of flowers and grass.

zh: 哦，多么美丽的地方！
en: Oh, what a beautiful place!

zh: 空气清新，水很干净，你可以看到蜜蜂和蝴蝶在跳舞。
en: The air is fresh and the water is clean, and you can see bees and butterflies dancing.

zh: 你想在这里野餐吗？
en: Do you want to have a picnic here?

zh: 早上好，周太太。您最近怎么样？
en: Good morning, Mrs. Zhou. How have you been?

zh: 哦，康康。我还好。我咳嗽少了。
en: Oh, Kangkang. I'm OK. I have coughed less.

zh: 你知道我之前喉咙疼。
en: You know I had a pain in my throat before.

zh: 我呼吸很困难。
en: It was difficult for me to breathe.

zh: 您看医生了吗？
en: Have you seen a doctor?

zh: 是的。医生说我现在好多了。
en: Yes. The doctor says I'm better.

zh: 化工厂以前排放可怕的气体，糟糕的空气让我胸口疼。
en: The chemical factory produced terrible gas before, and the bad air made my chest hurt.

zh: 更糟的是，工厂噪音太大，我晚上睡不好觉。
en: What was worse, the factory made too much noise and I couldn't sleep well at night.

zh: 是的，那真的很糟糕。
en: Yes, it was really awful.

zh: 我那时总是心情不好，因为我无法忍受这里的环境。
en: I was always in a bad mood because I couldn't bear the environment here.

zh: 幸运的是，政府已经解决了这个问题。
en: Luckily, the government has solved the problem.

zh: 顺便问一下，您注意到河里的鱼变多了吗？
en: By the way, have you noticed there are more fish in the river?

zh: 河水更干净更清澈了。
en: The river is cleaner and clearer.

zh: 环境变好了。
en: The environment has become good.

zh: 我想我应该给报社写信表达我的感谢。
en: I think I should write to the newspaper to show my thanks.

zh: 我写信是为了感谢我家附近更好的环境。
en: I'm writing to show my thanks for the better environment near my house.

zh: 以前这家工厂造成了太多问题。
en: The factory caused too much problems before.

zh: 它产生了可怕的气体，我们很难呼吸。
en: It produced terrible gas, and it was hard for us to breathe.

zh: 更糟糕的是，工厂制造了很多噪音。
en: What was worse, the factory made a lot of noise.

zh: 我们晚上睡不好觉。
en: We couldn't sleep well at night.

zh: 它还污染了附近的河流。
en: It also polluted the river nearby.

zh: 现在河里没有任何死鱼了。
en: Now there aren't any dead fish in the river.

zh: 它更干净、更清澈了。
en: It is cleaner and clearer.

zh: 我认为我们的政府为解决这些问题付出了巨大的努力。
en: I think our government has made great efforts to solve the problems.

zh: 再次感谢您给了我们一个更好的居住地。
en: Thanks again for giving us a better living place.

zh: 在当今世界，几乎每个人都知道空气污染对人们的健康有害。
en: In today's world, almost everyone knows air pollution is harmful to people's health.

zh: 然而，并非所有人都知道噪音也是一种污染，并且对人类健康有害。
en: However, not all people know noise is also a kind of pollution and is harmful to humans' health.

zh: 在嘈杂环境中工作和生活的人常常会变聋。
en: People who work and live in noisy conditions often go deaf.

zh: 例如，许多印刷报纸和书籍的工人失去了听力。
en: For example, many of the workers who print newspapers and books lose their hearing.

zh: 相当多住在机场附近的人也有听力损失。
en: Quite a few people living near airports also have hearing loss.

zh: 最近，据报道，美国许多青少年的听力和65岁的人一样差，因为这些年轻人总是听响亮的流行音乐。
en: Recently, it was reported that many teenagers in America can hear no better than 65-year-old people do, because these young people always listen to loud pop music.

zh: 在公共场合发出巨大的噪音也是一种污染。
en: Making a loud noise in public is also a kind of pollution.

zh: 它不仅打扰他人，而且对人们的听力造成巨大伤害。
en: It not only disturbs others but also does great harm to people's hearing.

zh: 汽车和机器也产生太多噪音。
en: Cars and machines also produce too much noise.

zh: 这种污染使人们感到不舒服和不愉快，甚至可能导致他们生病或耳聋。
en: Such pollution makes people feel uncomfortable and unpleasant, and it can even cause them to become sick or deaf.

zh: 如今，许多国家正试图解决各种环境问题，包括噪音污染。
en: Nowadays, many countries are trying to solve all sorts of environmental problems, including noise pollution.

zh: 有几家化工厂将废水倒入溪流中。
en: There were several chemical factories pouring waste water into the stream.

zh: 更糟糕的是，工厂制造了太多噪音......
en: What was worse, the factory made too much noise ...

zh: 噪音对人类健康有害。
en: Noise is harmful to humans' health.

zh: 在嘈杂环境中工作和生活的人常常会变聋。
en: People who work and live in noisy conditions often become deaf.

zh: 美国的许多青少年的听力不比65岁的人好。
en: Many teenagers in America can hear no better than 65-year-old people do.

zh: 它对人们的听力造成很大伤害。
en: It does great harm to people's hearing.

zh: 最近，人民和政府共同努力改善环境。
en: Recently, people and the governments have worked together to make the environment better.

zh: 他们使用了新技术，并已采取措施处理污染。
en: They have used new technologies and have taken steps to deal with pollution.

zh: 这使环境更健康了。
en: This has made the environment healthier.

zh: 所有这些表明世界正变得更加绿色和环保。
en: All these show that the world is becoming greener and more environmentally friendly.

zh: 然而，过去存在很多污染，包括空气污染、土壤污染、噪音污染和光污染。
en: However, in the past, there was a lot of pollution, including air pollution, soil pollution, noise pollution, and light pollution.

zh: 燃烧天然气、石油和煤炭造成了空气污染。
en: Burning gas, oil, and coal created air pollution.

zh: 它导致眼睛疼痛和呼吸问题。
en: It caused sore eyes and breathing problems.

zh: 随着人口的增长和工业的发展，人们不得不将大量垃圾填入土地。
en: With the increase in population and the development of industry, people had to put lots of litter into the land.

zh: 在田地里，农民使用了过多的化学品，这些化学品破坏了土壤。
en: In the fields, farmers used too many chemicals which destroyed the soil.

zh: 土壤污染导致了不健康的食物。
en: Soil pollution led to unhealthy food.

zh: 噪音污染损害了人们的听力。
en: Noise pollution harmed people's hearing.

zh: 如果人们在嘈杂的地方工作很长时间，他们会变聋。
en: People would become deaf if they worked in a noisy place for a long time.

zh: 过多的噪音也可能导致高血压。
en: Too much noise could cause high blood pressure as well.

zh: 是的。但这比前几年好多了。以前有沙尘暴。
en: Yes. But it's better than the last few years. There were sandstorms before.

zh: 当我走在街上时，我什么也看不见。
en: While I was walking down the street, I couldn't see anything.

zh: 沙子真的弄疼了我的脸。
en: The sand really hurt my face.

zh: 为什么天气这么糟糕？
en: Why was the weather so bad?

zh: 人们砍伐了太多的树木。
en: People cut down too many trees.

zh: 结果，许多肥沃的土地变成了沙漠。
en: As a result, a lot of rich land changed into desert.

zh: 树木可以阻止风把泥土吹走。
en: Trees can stop the wind from blowing the earth away.

zh: 而且森林可以节约大量的水。
en: And a lot of water can be saved by forests.

zh: 树木也可以阻止水把泥土冲走。
en: Trees can also stop the water from washing the earth away.

zh: 砍伐树木对天气影响很大。
en: Cutting down trees affects the weather so much.

zh: 是的。它对人类、动物和植物都是有害的。
en: Yes. It is harmful to human beings, animals and plants.

zh: 虽然以前有沙尘暴，但我们现在已经建起了“绿色长城”。
en: Although there were sandstorms before, now we have built "The Green Great Wall".

zh: 我们的环境已经变得好多了。
en: Our environment has become much better.

zh: 是关于我们城市的环境。
en: It's about the environment in our city.

zh: 它说空气的状况已经比以前更好了。
en: It says that the condition of the air has become better than before.

zh: 虽然我们是最大的煤炭生产和使用者之一，但空气污染已经得到控制。
en: Although we are one of the largest producers and users of coal, the air pollution has been under control.

zh: 是的。政府已经做了一些有益的事情来保护环境。
en: Yeah. The government has done something useful to protect the environment.

zh: 那太棒了。我们没有人喜欢污染。
en: That's great. None of us likes pollution.

zh: 是的。我们不应该到处乱扔垃圾。
en: Yes. We shouldn't leave rubbish here and there.

zh: 不要在公共场合随地吐痰。
en: Don't spit anywhere in public.

zh: 不要践踏草坪或采摘花朵。
en: Don't walk on grass or pick flowers.

zh: 每个人都应该关爱野生动物并种植更多的树木。
en: Everyone should care for wild animals and plant more trees.

zh: 没错。我们应该尽我们所能来保护环境。
en: That's right. We should do everything we can to protect the environment.

zh: 亲爱的校长，我写信告诉您很重要。
en: Dear Headmaster, I'm writing to tell you important.

zh: 没有人喜欢不整洁。
en: Nobody likes to be untidy.

zh: 然而，一些学生扔废纸和瓶子。
en: However, some students throw waste paper and bottles.

zh: 我们都需要一个安静的地方学习，但一些学生在学校经常制造太多噪音。
en: We all need a quiet place to study, but some students often make too much noise at school.

zh: 最糟糕的是，他们中的一些人在交谈时非常粗鲁。
en: Worst of all, some of them are quite rude when talking to.

zh: 知道他们的行为不好，但我们中的人知道如何阻止他们。
en: knows their behavior is bad, but of us knows how to stop them.

zh: 我认为我们应该制定规则来改变这种情况。
en: I think we should make rules to change the situation.

zh: 违反规则的人将受到惩罚。
en: who breaks the rules will be punished.

zh: 也许一开始我们很难遵守规则，但如果每个人都尽力遵守规则，我们的学校环境将会改善。
en: Perhaps it will be hard for us to obey the rules in the beginning, but if does his or her best to follow the rules, our school environment will improve.

zh: 全世界，人们已经砍伐了数百万棵树。
en: All over the world, people have cut down millions of trees.

zh: 当降雨或刮风时，土壤就被带走了。
en: When it rains or when the wind blows, the earth is taken away.

zh: 森林变成了沙漠，因此许多种类的动植物正在消失。
en: Forests have become deserts, so many kinds of animals and plants are disappearing.

zh: 在大城市，汽车和公交车污染了空气。
en: In big cities, cars and buses have polluted the air.

zh: 现在城市中的许多人都有健康问题。
en: Now many people in cities have health problems.

zh: 工厂也污染了土地和水。
en: Factories have also polluted the land and the water.

zh: 结果，许多河流和湖泊现在都失去了生命。
en: As a result, many rivers and lakes are now dead.

zh: 在地球周围，有一种特殊的氧气叫做“臭氧”（O3）。
en: Around the earth, there's a special kind of oxygen called "ozone"(O3).

zh: 它对地球很重要。
en: It is important to the earth.

zh: 但现在空气污染正在破坏它，并在臭氧层上造成了一个非常大的洞。
en: But now air pollution is destroying it and making a very big hole in the ozone layer.

zh: 来自太阳的过多有害辐射穿过这个洞，直接到达地球。
en: Too much harmful radiation from the sun passes through the hole and reaches the earth directly.

zh: 这非常危险，因为这种辐射可能导致癌症。
en: This is very dangerous because this kind of radiation can cause cancer.

zh: 空气中的二氧化碳（CO2）已经增加了很多。
en: Carbon dioxide (CO2) in the air has increased a lot.

zh: 它主要来自燃烧石油、煤和木材。
en: It mainly comes from burning oil, coal and wood.

zh: 这在地球周围形成了一层毯子。
en: This has formed a blanket around the earth.

zh: 来自太阳的热量无法逃逸，因此温度正在上升。
en: The heat from the sun can't escape so the temperature is rising.

zh: 这被称为“温室效应”。
en: This is called "the greenhouse effect".

zh: 它导致海平面上升和地球气候发生变化。
en: It causes the level of the oceans to rise and the climate of the earth to change.

zh: 所有这些问题都非常严重，所以我们现在必须采取行动。
en: All these problems are very serious, so we must do something now.

zh: 地球有46亿年的历史。
en: The earth is 4.6 billion years old.

zh: 我们人类在地球上只生活了35000年，但在此期间，我们在许多方面极大地改变了我们的星球。
en: We humans have lived on the earth for only 35 000 years, but during this period, we have changed our planet a lot in many ways.

zh: 我们所做的一些事情对地球非常有益，而另一些则是有害的。
en: Some things we have done are very good for the earth while others are bad.

zh: 大海似乎有最好的答案。海里有大量的水。但我们需要从海水中去除盐分。这非常昂贵。如果科学家能找到更便宜的方法，我们就能解决水资源短缺的问题。
en: The sea seems to have the best answer. There is plenty of water in the sea. But we need to take the salt away from the sea water. This is very expensive. If scientists can find cheaper ways to do it, we can solve the problem of the shortage of water.

zh: 我们如何避免严重的水资源短缺？首先，我们应该节约用水，不浪费水。其次，我们应该保护我们的水资源，不污染它们。第三，我们应该发现再利用水的方法。科学家们在这个领域已经取得了一些进展。如今，一些大城市正在重复利用他们的水。但是人们对水的需求日益增长。我们仍然没有足够的水。我们还能做些什么？
en: How can we avoid a serious water shortage? First, we should save water and not waste it. Second, we should protect our water resources and not pollute them. Third, we should discover ways to reuse water. Scientists have made some progress in this field. Today, some large cities are reusing their water. But people's need for water is increasing day by day. We still don't have enough water. What else can we do?

zh: 尽管世界是饥饿的，但它甚至更渴。虽然地球近四分之三被水覆盖，我们仍然缺乏饮用水。这是因为地球上大约97%的水是海水。所以我们不能直接用它来浇灌植物或饮用。人类只能饮用和使用来自河流、湖泊和地下等地方的淡水。
en: Although the world is hungry, it is even thirstier. While nearly 3/4 of the earth is covered with water, we are still short of drinking water. This is because about 97% of the water on the earth is sea water. So we can't use it for watering plants or drinking directly. Humans can only drink and use fresh water from places including rivers, lakes and underground.

zh: 嗨，康康。我能问你几个问题吗？
en: Hi, Kangkang. Could I ask you a few questions?

zh: 我们都知道你为一个保护环境的组织工作。
en: We all know that you're working for an organization that protects the environment.

zh: 你能告诉我们你在那里做什么吗？
en: Can you tell us what you are doing there?

zh: 嗯，我的主要工作是帮助传播保护环境的信息。
en: Well, my main job is to help spread the message about protecting the environment.

zh: 例如，减少、再利用和回收垃圾是很重要的。
en: For example, it's important to reduce, reuse and recycle the litter.

zh: 那么我们在家可以做些什么来保护环境呢？
en: So what can we do at home to protect the environment?

zh: 我们应该减少我们产生的废物。
en: We should reduce the waste we produce.

zh: 例如，我们应该使用纸张的两面并重复使用塑料袋。
en: For example, we should use both sides of paper and reuse plastic bags.

zh: 学生在学校可以做些什么？
en: What can students do at school?

zh: 回收可以保护环境，也可以省钱。
en: Recycling can protect the environment, and it can save money, too.

zh: 所以我们鼓励学生收集废纸和软饮料罐。
en: So we encourage students to collect waste paper and soft drink cans.

zh: 然后我们对它们进行分类，以便它们可以被回收。
en: Then we sort them so that they can be recycled.

zh: 噪音是一种污染。它对我们的听力有害。
en: Noise is a kind of pollution. It's harmful to our hearing.

zh: 努力学习。否则你会考试不及格。
en: Work hard. You will fail the exam.

zh: 点头表示同意。摇头表示不同意。
en: Nodding the head means agreement. Shaking the head means disagreement.

zh: 快点。否则你会错过公交车。
en: Hurry up. You will miss the bus.

zh: 他已经失败了好几次。但他从不放弃。
en: He has failed several times. He never gives up.

zh: 嗨，迈克尔。你想成为一个更环保的人吗？
en: Hi, Michael. Would you like to be a greener person?

zh: 当然，我很乐意。但我应该做什么呢？
en: Of course, I'd love to. But what should I do?

zh: 首先，你离开房间时应该关掉电源。
en: First, you ought to shut off the electricity when you leave a room.

zh: 哦，那很容易。接下来呢？
en: Oh, that's easy. What's next?

zh: 第二，如果你短途旅行，你最好步行或骑自行车，而不是坐公共汽车或出租车。
en: Second, you'd better walk or ride a bike instead of taking a bus or a taxi if you travel a short distance.

zh: 没错。这样可以节约能源并减少空气污染。
en: That's right. It will save energy and reduce air pollution.

zh: 第三，购物时带上布袋。不要使用塑料袋。
en: Third, take a cloth bag when you go shopping. Don't use plastic bags.

zh: 成为一个更环保的人真容易。
en: It's so easy to be a greener person.

zh: 嗯，行动胜于雄辩。
en: Well, actions speak louder than words.

zh: 地球是我们的家园。
en: The earth is our home.

zh: 我们做的一些事情对地球有益，而有些则有害。
en: Some things we have done are good for the earth while some are bad.

zh: 我们污染了地球，现在它生病了。
en: We have polluted the earth, and it is sick now.

zh: 我们砍伐了太多的树木，因此许多肥沃的土地变成了沙漠。
en: We cut down too many trees, so lots of rich land has changed into desert.

zh: 工厂将废水排入河流。
en: Factories pour waste water into rivers.

zh: 污染已经引起了许多严重的问题。
en: Pollution has caused many serious problems.

zh: 地球正在呼救。
en: The earth is crying for help.

zh: 我们应该做些什么来拯救它？
en: What shall we do to save it?

zh: 我们应该种植更多的树木，减少我们产生的废物，回收废纸和软饮料罐，并骑自行车以减少空气污染。
en: We should plant more trees, reduce the waste we produce, recycle the waste paper and soft drink cans, and ride bikes to reduce air pollution.

zh: 我认为我们应该努力成为更环保的人来保护我们的地球。
en: I think we should try to be greener people to protect our earth.

zh: 毕竟，我们只有一个地球。
en: After all, we have only one earth.

zh: 我们应该尽一切努力保护它，否则我们将受到惩罚并失去我们的家园。
en: We should do everything to protect it, or we'll be punished and lose our home.

zh: 你经常做什么来成为一个更环保的人？
en: What do you often do to be a greener person?

zh: 嗯，当我不使用电器时，我总是关闭电源。
en: Well, I always shut off the electricity when I am not using it.

zh: 中国正在使用新技术来制造能源。
en: China is using new technology to make energy.

zh: 他们建造了大型太阳能发电场，比如龙羊峡大坝太阳能公园，利用太阳来发电。
en: They built big solar farms, like the Longyangxia Dam Solar Park, to produce electricity from the sun.

zh: 多亏了太阳能，它需要更少的煤和石油。
en: Thanks to solar energy, it requires less coal and oil.

zh: 这是保护我们的地球免受污染的好方法。
en: It is a good way to protect our earth from pollution.

zh: 中国也在制造更多的电动汽车。
en: China is also making more electric vehicles.

zh: 由于这些车辆不需要汽油，它们对环境更好，并使交通更清洁。
en: Since these vehicles don't need petrol, they are better for the environment and make transportation cleaner.

zh: 中国的快速列车，比如京沪高速列车，正在使旅行更容易。
en: China's fast trains, like the Beijing-Shanghai high-speed train, are making travel easier.

zh: 尽管它们有轮子，但内部没有轮子噪音。
en: Though they have wheels, there is no wheel noise inside.

zh: 甚至德国专家也高度评价中国高速列车的技术。
en: Even German experts think highly of the technology of China's high-speed train.

zh: 所有这些都表明，中国正在努力寻找新的更好的方法来生产能源并使旅行更容易，同时不对地球造成伤害。
en: All of these show that China is working hard to find new and better ways to produce energy and make travel easier without harm to the earth.

zh: 中国在为其他国家使用廉价和绿色能源方面树立了一个好榜样。
en: China serves as a good guide for other countries in using cheap and green energy.

zh: 太阳、风、波浪和来自地球深处的热量是能源。
en: The sun, wind, waves and heat from deep in the earth are energy sources.

zh: 它们永远不会耗尽，因此被称为可再生资源。
en: They will never run out so they are called renewable sources.

zh: 2011年，全球使用的能源中约有16%来自可再生资源。
en: In 2011, about 16% of energy used worldwide came from renewable sources.

zh: 它的使用量每年都在迅速增加。
en: The use of it is increasing rapidly each year.

zh: 回收利用可以保护环境，而且也能省钱。
en: Recycling can protect the environment, and it can save money, too.

zh: 我们做的一些事情对地球有益，而有些则有害。
en: Some things we have done are good for the earth while some are bad.

zh: 我们应该尽一切努力保护它，否则我们将受到惩罚并失去我们的家园。
en: We should do everything to protect it, or we'll be punished and lose our home.

zh: 行动可以发声，但言语无法做到。
en: Actions can speak, but words can't do it.

zh: 森林是地球的肺。
en: Forests are the lungs of the earth.

zh: 没有它们，地球就无法呼吸。
en: Without them, it cannot breathe.

zh: 它需要其森林来清除空气中的二氧化碳并制造氧气。
en: It needs its forests to remove carbon dioxide from the air and to make oxygen.

zh: 在许多国家，如新西兰、加拿大和巴西，森林被砍伐以提供建造房屋的木材。
en: In many countries, such as New Zealand, Canada, and Brazil, forests were cut down to provide wood to build houses.

zh: 世界各地的许多志愿者在假期里工作，种植新树来替代它们。
en: Many volunteers around the world are working in their holidays to plant new trees to replace them.

zh: 他们在种植新树时面临许多困难。
en: They face many difficulties when planting new trees.

zh: 天气可能非常炎热干燥，也可能非常寒冷潮湿。
en: The weather may be very hot and dry or it may be very cold and wet.

zh: 在他们工作时，经常有许多昆虫叮咬这些种植者的腿、胳膊和脸。
en: There are often many insects that bite these planters on their legs, arms, and faces while they work.

zh: 他们扛着沉重的一袋袋小树，而且在山区工作可能很危险。
en: They carry heavy bags of small trees, and working in the mountains can be dangerous.

zh: 中国志愿者帮助在世界各地种植了许多树木。
en: Chinese volunteers have helped plant lots of trees around the world.

zh: 他们有宏伟的计划来种植更多的森林，并已使用新技术来实现他们的目标。
en: They have big plans to grow more forests and have used new technologies to reach their goals.

zh: 通过每年种植数百万棵树，他们不仅使自己的环境变得更好，而且也在帮助整个世界。
en: By planting millions of trees every year, they are not only making their own environment better but also helping the whole world.

zh: 这表明中国人真正关心地球。
en: This shows that Chinese really care about the earth.

zh: 鲍勃：所以你可以去我家附近的电影院。这部电影这周日会在那里上映。
en: Bob: So you can go to the cinema near my home. The movie will be on there this Sunday.

zh: 吉姆：但是我去过那家电影院。我不知道怎么去那里。
en: Jim: But I have been to that cinema. I don't know how to get there.

zh: 鲍勃：周日来找我，我会告诉你怎么走。
en: Bob: Come to see me on Sunday and I will show you the way.

zh: 玛丽住的地方离工作地点大约五英里。
en: Mary lives about five miles from her work.

zh: 她过去常乘公共汽车去那里。
en: She used to take a bus there.

zh: 现在没有公共汽车走那条路线了。
en: Now there are no buses travelling that way.

zh: 所以她骑车上班，而她的同事开车。
en: So she rides to work, while her colleagues drive their cars.

zh: 虽然她买得起车，但她不想增加地球的污染。
en: Although she could afford a car, she did not want to add to the earth's pollution.

zh: 所以她买了一辆电动自行车。
en: So she bought an electric bike.

zh: 这辆自行车不污染环境，而且玛丽不需要支付汽油费。
en: The bike does not pollute and Mary does not need to pay for gasoline.

zh: 她很高兴她的自行车没有污染环境。
en: She is happy that her bike is not polluting the environment.

zh: 近年来，某些产品的包装，例如月饼，变得非常漂亮但过度了。
en: In recent years, the packaging for certain products, for example, mooncakes, has become very beautiful but excessive.

zh: 包装的成本常常高于产品本身的成本。
en: The cost of the packaging is often higher than that of the product.

zh: 商品的过度包装产生大量浪费，严重浪费我们的自然资源并污染我们的环境。
en: The over-packaging of goods creates a lot of waste, seriously wastes our natural resources and pollutes our environment.

zh: 这部在上海制作的新视频探访了市场......
en: This new video, produced in Shanghai, visits markets...

zh: 9月22日是全世界范围内的“无车日”，但昆明是中国唯一每月都有“无车日”的城市。
en: September 22 is "No Car Day" around the world, but Kunming is the only Chinese city to have "No Car Day" every month.

zh: 它在每月的最后一个星期六，从上午9点到下午5点。
en: It is on the last Saturday from 9:00 a.m. to 5:00 p.m.

zh: 该政策要求只有出租车、公共汽车、自行车和特殊用途车辆被允许在城市任何地方行驶。
en: The policy requires that only taxis, buses, bikes and special purpose vehicles are allowed to travel anywhere in the city.

zh: 据报道，在9月22日，由于车辆减少，昆明的空气质量要好得多。
en: On September 22, the air quality in Kunming was reported to be much better because of fewer vehicles.

zh: 嗨，男生们，快来看！我有一张米老鼠和唐老鸭的海报。
en: Hi, boys, come and have a look! I have a poster of Mickey Mouse and Donald Duck.

zh: 哦，真好看！你可以把它贴在墙上。
en: Oh, it's so nice! You can stick it on the wall.

zh: 猜猜怎么着！我和我父母要去参观洛杉矶附近的迪士尼乐园。
en: Guess what! My parents and I are going to visit Disneyland, near Los Angeles.

zh: 我将能看到更多的卡通人物。
en: I will be able to see more cartoon characters.

zh: 哦，你真幸运！迪士尼乐园受到全世界数百万人的喜爱。
en: Oh, you're so lucky! Disneyland is enjoyed by millions of people from all over the world.

zh: 我希望有一天我也能去那里。
en: I hope I can go there one day.

zh: 你为你的旅行准备好了吗？
en: Are you ready for your trip?

zh: 是的，当然。我迫不及待要飞过去了！
en: Yes, of course. I can't wait to fly there!

zh: 你在那里将有一个很好的机会练习英语。
en: You'll have a good chance to practice English there.

zh: 你说得对。英语在美国是主要语言。
en: You're right. English is spoken as the main language in America.

zh: 是的。现在它在全世界也被广泛使用。
en: Yeah. It is also widely used throughout the world now.

zh: 但我的英语不好。我有点害怕。
en: But I'm not good at English. I'm a little afraid.

zh: 别担心。尽你最大的努力，从现在开始更加努力地学习。
en: Don't worry. Try your best and work much harder from now on.

zh: 爸爸，你为什么在打包行李？
en: Dad, why are you packing your bags?

zh: 我今晚要去古巴出差。
en: I'm going to Cuba on business tonight.

zh: 你看到我的护照了吗？
en: Have you seen my passport?

zh: 它在你的床头柜里。
en: It's in your night table.

zh: 爸爸，英语是古巴的官方语言吗？
en: Dad, is English spoken as the official language in Cuba?

zh: 不，西班牙语是那里的官方语言。
en: No, Spanish is spoken as the official language there.

zh: 西班牙语和英语相似吗？
en: Is Spanish similar to English?

zh: 也许有些单词是相同的。
en: Perhaps a few words are the same.

zh: 你有可能在沟通上遇到麻烦吗？
en: Is it possible for you to have trouble communicating?

zh: 我认为我不会用西班牙语进行任何长对话。
en: I don't think I will have any long conversations in Spanish.

zh: 如果有必要，我会请翻译帮忙。
en: If necessary, I'll ask an interpreter for help.

zh: 翻译会向你解释这个国家的文化吗？
en: Will the interpreter explain the culture of the country to you?

zh: 理解语言和文化可以帮助我很好地工作。
en: Understanding the language and the culture can help me work well.

zh: 世界上有数千种语言被使用。
en: There are thousands of languages spoken in the world.

zh: 在所有语言中，英语是使用最广泛的。
en: Of all these languages, English is the most widely used.

zh: 最近的调查显示，超过5亿人以英语为母语。
en: Recent surveys show that more than 500 million people speak English as their mother tongue.

zh: 英语起源于英格兰，通过英国商人和在新领土上的英国政府传播到世界各地。
en: From its roots in England, the language was spread around the world by English traders and English governments in new lands.

zh: 这些新领土之一成为了美利坚合众国。
en: One of these new lands became the United States of America.

zh: 美国人口为3.09亿，使其成为以英语为母语者人数最多的国家。
en: The population of the United States is 309 million, making it the country with the largest number of native English speakers.

zh: 大约有3亿人将英语作为第二语言。
en: About 300 million people speak English as their second language.

zh: 还有更多的人，比如在欧洲以及中国和日本的一些人，将英语作为外语来学习。
en: There are even more people, like some in Europe as well as in China and Japan, who study English as a foreign language.

zh: 英语已成为国际商务、世界航空甚至互联网的基础语言。
en: English has become the base language for international business, for the world's airlines and even for the internet.

zh: 无论人们说什么语言，如果他们在这些领域工作，就需要懂一些英语。
en: Whatever language people speak, they need to know some English if they work in these fields.

zh: 很明显，英语正变得越来越重要。
en: It is clear that the English language is becoming more important.

zh: 英语在全世界被广泛使用。
en: English has been widely used around the world.

zh: 我们可以从历史中找到答案。
en: We may find the answer from history.

zh: 十九世纪，英国成为一个强大的国家，因此英语成为一门国际语言。
en: In the nineteenth century, Great Britain became a powerful country, so English became an international language.

zh: 然后，自20世纪50年代以来，美国变得越来越强大。
en: Then, since the 1950s, the USA has become more and more powerful.

zh: 美国的计算机和互联网产业已占据世界领先地位。
en: The American computer and internet industry have taken the leading position in the world.

zh: 结果，互联网帮助英语变得更加流行。
en: As a result, the internet has helped English to become much more popular.

zh: 中国，世界上人口最多的国家，自20世纪70年代以来鼓励了更多人学习英语。
en: China, a country with the largest population in the world, has encouraged more people to learn English since the 1970s.

zh: 自20世纪90年代以来，英语学习在中国人中非常受欢迎。
en: Since the 1990s, English learning has been very popular with Chinese people.

zh: 他们中的许多人在英语方面表现良好，并在口语上取得了巨大进步。
en: Many of them have done well in English and have made great progress in speaking it.

zh: 现在，学生被要求学习英语，英语在中国以及世界其他地区都被视为一门非常重要的学科。
en: Now, students are required to learn English, and English is regarded as a very important subject in China as well as in the rest of the world.

zh: 辩论的主题是“世界上哪种语言将被更广泛地使用，中文还是英语？”
en: The topic of the debate is "Which language will be more widely used in the world, Chinese or English?".

zh: 有些事物通常在不同的文化中有不同的含义。
en: Some things usually have different meanings in different cultures.

zh: 我简直不敢相信我要飞往迪士尼乐园了。我太兴奋了。
en: I can't believe that I'm flying to Disneyland. I'm so excited.

zh: 那个陌生人在请求搭车。看他的手势！
en: The stranger is asking for a ride. Look at his gesture!

zh: 打扰一下，请问你能载我去机场吗？
en: Excuse me, could you please give me a ride to the airport?

zh: 当然。我们要去同一个地方。请上车吧。
en: Sure. We're going to the same place. Get on, please.

zh: 你的航班是几点的？
en: What time is your flight?

zh: 5点钟。我叔叔明天会来接我们。但我还是担心我的英语。
en: At 5 o'clock. My uncle is meeting us tomorrow. But I'm still worried about my English.

zh: 不用担心。你可以买这本指南书，《美国之旅》。
en: No need to worry. You can buy the guidebook, A Tour in the USA.

zh: 好主意。我希望我在沟通上不会遇到太多困难。
en: Good idea. I hope I won't have many difficulties in communicating.

zh: 无论何时你需要帮助，给我发邮件或打电话。
en: Whenever you need help, send me an e-mail or call me.

zh: 非常感谢。我现在必须得走了。再见！
en: Thank you very much. I have to go now. Bye!

zh: 幸雄，当简说“嗨”时她会挥手，但你说“你好”时会鞠躬。
en: Yukio, when Jane says "Hi" she waves her hand, but when you say "Hello" you bow.

zh: 在日本，我们说你好时会鞠躬，以示尊重。
en: In Japan, we bow when we are saying hello as a sign of respect.

zh: 在加拿大，我们挥手以示和平与友谊。
en: In Canada, we wave as a sign of peace and friendship.

zh: 我认为那被称为肢体语言。
en: I think that is known as body language.

zh: 我们用肢体语言来交流我们的感受，即使是在沉默的时候。
en: We use body language to communicate how we feel, even if there is silence.

zh: 你注意到王老师高兴时会微笑，生气时会把手放在臀部吗？
en: Did you notice that Miss Wang smiles when she is happy, and when she is angry she puts her hands on her hips?

zh: 然后我就知道她会表扬还是惩罚我们。
en: Then I know whether she will praise or punish us.

zh: 当我小妹妹生气时，她会交叉双臂并跺脚！
en: When my little sister is angry, she crosses her arms and stamps her foot!

zh: 我想知道肢体语言在所有文化中是否意味着同一件事。
en: I wonder if body language means the same thing in all cultures.

zh: 我们应该做一些研究。
en: We should do some research.

zh: 如果人们更了解他们的肢体语言，他们就能更好地交流。
en: People could communicate better if they knew more about their body language.

zh: 让我们问问王老师和琼斯女士是否愿意帮助我们的研究。
en: Let's ask Miss Wang and Ms. Jones if they will help us with our research.

zh: 那是个好主意。
en: That is a good idea.

zh: 用你的肢体语言来帮助表达自己。
en: Use your body language to help express yourself.

zh: 你知道每个关于狗的短语的意思吗？
en: Do you know the meaning of each phrase about dogs?

zh: 有些事物通常在不同的文化中有不同的含义。
en: Some things usually have different meanings in different cultures.

zh: 这里有一些关于动物的词，在西方文化和中国文化中的用法不同。
en: Here are some words about animals that are used differently in western cultures and Chinese culture.

zh: 中文中大多数关于狗的短语，比如“丧家犬”、“疯狗”、“走狗”和“狗拿耗子”，都有负面的含义。
en: Most phrases in Chinese about the dog, such as "a homeless dog", "a mad dog", "a running dog" and "a dog catching a mouse", have negative meanings.

zh: 但在西方国家，狗被认为是人类诚实的好朋友。
en: But in western countries, dogs are considered honest and good friends of humans.

zh: “狗”这个词有积极的含义。
en: The word, "dog", has positive meanings.

zh: 例如，“你是一个幸运儿”意思是你是一个幸运的人。
en: For example, "you are a lucky dog" means you are a lucky person.

zh: 并且“凡人皆有得意日”意思是每个人有时都会有好运。
en: And "every dog has its day" means each person has good luck at times.

zh: 众所周知，龙在中国文化中非常重要。
en: As we know, dragons are very important in Chinese culture.

zh: 在古代，龙被认为是强大而神奇的生物。
en: In ancient times, dragons were regarded as strong and magical creatures.

zh: 它们带来了希望和好运。
en: They brought hope and good luck.

zh: 古代的皇帝将自己比作龙。
en: The ancient emperors compared themselves to dragons.

zh: 如今，许多父母希望他们的孩子成为“龙”（有出息）。
en: Nowadays, many parents want their children to become "dragons".

zh: 但在西方文化中，龙是危险的动物。
en: But in western cultures, dragons were dangerous animals.

zh: 英雄们杀死它们以保护人民。
en: Heroes killed them to protect people.

zh: 有些事物在中国文化和西方文化中有相似的含义。
en: Some things have similar meanings in Chinese culture and western cultures.

zh: 玫瑰在中国和一些西方国家都被视为爱情的象征。
en: The rose is regarded as a symbol of love in both China and some western countries.

zh: 中国和西方的人们认为玫瑰也代表和平、勇气和友谊。
en: People in China and the West think the rose also stands for peace, courage and friendship.

zh: 当我们注意词语的文化含义时，我们会更好地理解它们。
en: When we pay attention to the cultural meanings of words, we will understand them better.

zh: 在中国，许多父母希望他们的孩子成为“龙”。
en: In China, many parents want their children to become "dragons".

zh: 这里的“龙”指的是成功人士。
en: The "dragons" here mean successful people.

zh: 在西方国家，英雄们杀死龙来保护人们。
en: In western countries, heroes killed dragons to protect people.

zh: 这表明龙被认为是危险的。
en: This shows dragons are considered to be dangerous.

zh: 人们说玫瑰通常代表爱情。
en: People say the rose often stands for love.

zh: 狗被认为是人类诚实的好朋友。
en: Dogs are regarded as honest and good friends of humans.

zh: 你需要更多地注意这种差异。
en: You need to pay attention to the difference more.

zh: 罗伯特·彭斯将他的爱人比作一朵红玫瑰。
en: Robert Burns compared his love to a red rose.

zh: 每个人有时都会犯错。
en: Everybody makes mistakes at times.

zh: 许多地方的人们都说英语。
en: English is spoken by people in many places.

zh: 它起源于英国，但随着英国人离开他们的国家并建立新的家园而传播开来。
en: It began in England but spread as the British people left their country and made new homes.

zh: 许多年后，英语开始发生变化。
en: After many years, the English language began to change.

zh: 这些变化主要是表达方式和拼写。
en: The changes were mainly expressions and spellings.

zh: 在英国，人们说“underground”，而在美国，人们说“subway”。
en: People in England say "underground" while people in America say "subway".

zh: 在美国，电梯从一楼开始运行，但在英国，它从地面层开始运行。
en: In America an elevator starts on the first floor, but in Britain it starts on the ground floor.

zh: “Colour”和“centre”是英式拼写，而“color”和“center”是相同单词的美式拼写。
en: "Colour" and "centre" are British spellings while "color" and "center" are American spellings for the same words.

zh: 单词的发音和说话方式也发生了变化。
en: Pronunciation of words and ways of speaking have changed as well.

zh: 我叔叔明天要和我们见面。
en: My uncle is meeting us tomorrow.

zh: 他下周日要去伦敦。
en: He is going to London next Sunday.

zh: 鲍勃什么时候去伦敦？
en: When is Bob going to London?

zh: 打扰一下，请问你能载我去机场吗？
en: Excuse me, could you please give me a ride to the airport?

zh: 无论何时你需要帮助，给我发电子邮件或打电话。
en: Whenever you need help, send me an e-mail or call me.

zh: 通过听一个人的讲话，有可能分辨出他是美国人还是英国人。
en: It is possible to tell whether a person is American or British by listening to his or her speech.

zh: 现在，英语是加拿大、美国和澳大利亚等国家大多数人所说的语言。
en: Now, English is the language spoken by most people in countries like Canada, America and Australia.

zh: 他们还从中文中借用了“豆腐”和“叩头”。
en: They also borrowed "tofu" and "kowtow" from Chinese.

zh: 有时不同的人使用不同的词来表示相同的事物。
en: Sometimes different people use different words to mean the same thing.

zh: 英语也通过借用其他语言的词汇发生了变化。
en: The English language has also changed by borrowing words from other languages.

zh: 美国人从古法语中借用了“cent”，从德语中借用了“cookbook”。
en: The Americans borrowed "cent" from old French and "cookbook" from German.

zh: 英语一直在变化，但来自英语国家的人们仍然能够相互理解。
en: The English language is changing all the time, but people from English-speaking countries are still able to understand each other.

zh: 亲爱的迈克尔，你好吗？我从加利福尼亚给你写信。
en: Dear Michael, How are you doing? I'm writing to you from California.

zh: 我想了解英式英语和美式英语之间的一些差异，尤其是在表达方面，因为我很难理解这里的人。
en: I want to know some differences between British English and American English, especially in expressions, because I have difficulty in understanding the people here.

zh: 有时我跟不上他们。
en: Sometimes I can't follow them.

zh: 更糟糕的是，我无法理解他们的一些肢体语言和拼写。
en: Even worse, I can't understand some of their body language and spelling.

zh: 请尽快给我回信。
en: Please write back to me soon.

zh: 向你和你家人致以最美好的祝愿！
en: Best wishes to you and your family!

zh: 见到你回来真是太好了，俊峰！你的旅行怎么样？
en: How nice to see you back, Junfeng! How was your trip?

zh: 太棒了！我去了很多名胜古迹，在迪士尼乐园玩得很开心。
en: Wonderful! I've been to many places of interest and I enjoyed myself in Disneyland.

zh: 你在美国能让人理解你的意思吗？
en: Could you make yourself understood in the USA?

zh: 不太能。有时我遇到了麻烦。
en: Not really. Sometimes I got into trouble.

zh: 他们说话对我来说太快了，而且有很多不同的口音。
en: They spoke too quickly for me and there were many different accents.

zh: 我无法和那里的人进行长时间的对话。
en: I couldn't have long conversations with the people there.

zh: 我认为我应该更努力地学习英语。
en: I think I should work harder at English.

zh: 是的，我同意。我知道英语口语很重要，但我不敢在公共场合说英语。
en: Yes, I agree. I know oral English is very important, but I dare not speak English in public.

zh: 而且我上英语课时总是感到困倦。
en: And I always feel sleepy in English classes.

zh: 我真的很害怕期末考试。
en: I'm really afraid of the final exam.

zh: 而且对我来说记住新单词非常困难。
en: And it's very difficult for me to remember new words.

zh: 我已经努力了一整周，但似乎没有任何进步。
en: I've worked hard at it for a whole week, but it seems that I haven't made any progress.

zh: 我不知道该怎么办。
en: I don't know what to do.

zh: 有时我想放弃。
en: At times I feel like giving up.

zh: 请不要让这些困难使你气馁。
en: Please don't let these difficulties discourage you.

zh: 也许我们可以向康康求助。
en: Perhaps we can ask Kangkang for help.

zh: 他擅长英语。
en: He is good at English.

zh: 康康，你能给我们一些关于如何学好英语的建议吗？
en: Kangkang, could you give us some advice on how to learn English well?

zh: 当然。两年前，我的英语也很差。
en: Sure. Two years ago, I was also weak in English.

zh: 如何提高英语是我最大的问题。
en: How to improve it was my biggest problem.

zh: 所以我向布朗先生求助，我从他那里学到了很多。
en: So I turned to Mr. Brown and I've learned a lot from him.

zh: 太好了。你是怎么记新单词的？
en: Great. How do you remember new words?

zh: 我总是把新单词抄在纸片上，把它们贴在我卧室或客厅的墙上，当我看到它们时就大声朗读。
en: I always copy new words on pieces of paper, stick them on the walls in my bedroom or in the living room, and read the words aloud when I see them.

zh: 而且，我总是读我看到的物品上的英语单词。
en: Also, I always read the English words on the objects I see.

zh: 我总是读英语课本，但有些课文对我来说很难。
en: I always read English textbooks, but some texts are difficult for me.

zh: 你能告诉我如何提高我的阅读能力吗？
en: Could you please tell me how to improve my reading ability?

zh: 试着猜生词的意思，并抓住文章的主旨。
en: Try to guess the meanings of new words, and get the main idea of the article.

zh: 康康，我不敢在课堂上回答问题，因为我害怕犯错。
en: Kangkang, I dare not answer questions in class because I'm afraid of making mistakes.

zh: 思考你的答案，深呼吸并微笑，然后回答问题。
en: Think about your answer, take a deep breath and smile, and then answer the question.

zh: 我会试一试的。
en: I'll give it a try.

zh: 我很高兴与大家分享我们小组的意见。
en: I'm very glad to share our group's opinions with you.

zh: 康康说他课前预习当天的课程，课上做笔记，课后复习。
en: Kangkang said that he previewed the day's lesson before class, took notes in class and reviewed them after class.

zh: 林平说：“读一篇文章，然后试着自己复述。”
en: Lin Ping said, "Read a passage. Then try to retell it yourself."

zh: 于珍认为学习英语时学习语法很重要。
en: Yu Zhen thought studying grammar was important when learning English.

zh: 我自己更喜欢看英文电影，虽然有时我不能完全理解它们。
en: I myself prefer watching English movies, though sometimes I can't understand them exactly.

zh: 很荣幸在这里与大家交谈。
en: It's an honor to talk with all of you here.

zh: 我们小组同意第一小组的一些意见。
en: Our group agrees with some of Group One's opinions.

zh: 然而，我们有一些其他的想法。
en: However, we have some other ideas.

zh: 徐多多说参加英语俱乐部是提高她英语水平的最好方法。
en: Xu Duoduo said that joining an English club was the best way to improve her English.

zh: 程乐建议我们读一份好的英文报纸。
en: Cheng Le advised us to read a good English newspaper.

zh: 但她说：“我们阅读时不应该逐字翻译。”
en: But she said, "We shouldn't translate every word when we are reading."

zh: 舒燕告诉我们应该尽可能经常地与老师、同学甚至外国人说英语。
en: Shu Yan told us we should speak English with our teachers, classmates and even with foreigners as often as possible.

zh: 做得好！你们俩告诉了我们很多好方法。
en: Good job! You two have told us many good methods.

zh: 我们每个人都可以使用其中的一种或多种方法。
en: Each of us can use one or more of them.

zh: 但记住要选择最适合你的方法。
en: But remember to choose the ones that suit you best.

zh: 我相信只要你们坚持下去，就会取得很大进步。
en: I'm sure that you will make great progress as long as you stick to them.

zh: 而且我认为用英语写日记是提高写作水平的好方法。
en: And I think keeping a diary in English is a good way to improve your writing.

zh: 此外，我们课本中的歌谣、歌曲和谜语也很有帮助。
en: Also, the chants, songs and riddles in our textbooks are helpful.

zh: 好的学习方法可以帮助我们用更少的努力获得更好的结果。
en: Good study methods can help us achieve better results with less effort.

zh: 我是一个害羞的男孩，我不喜欢说话。
en: I'm a shy boy, and I don't like to talk.

zh: 我的英语口语不好，因为我害怕在英语课上回答老师的问题。
en: My spoken English is not good because I'm afraid of answering the teacher's questions in English class.

zh: 而且课后，我没有机会练习说英语。
en: And after class, I have no chance to practice speaking English.

zh: 你在英语学习中遇到问题了吗？如果是这样，以下两种方法将帮助你更轻松、更有趣地学习英语！
en: Are you facing problems in learning English? If so, the following two ways will help you to learn it more easily and with more fun!

zh: “我从网上下载英文歌曲。这确实提高了我的听力。
en: "I download English songs from the internet. It has really improved my listening.

zh: 更重要的是，当我这样学习时，我更快乐，”一位初中生说。
en: What's more, I am happier when I study this way," said one junior student.

zh: 听你最喜欢的英文歌曲实际上是一种有效的方法。
en: Listening to your favorite English songs is actually an effective way.

zh: 在听之前，你可以先阅读并找出这首歌是关于什么的。
en: Before you listen, you can read first and find out what the song is about.

zh: 在听的时候，挑选一些有用的单词或短语。
en: While listening, pick some useful words or phrases.

zh: 如果有必要，字典也可能会有帮助。
en: A dictionary may also be helpful if necessary.

zh: 看电影是另一个好且有趣的方式。
en: Watching a movie is another good and interesting way.

zh: “看电影很棒，它能对你的英语有很大帮助！”一位初三学生说。
en: "It is wonderful to watch movies, and it can help your English a lot!" said a junior three student.

zh: “你也可以模仿演员的发音。”
en: "You can also imitate the pronunciation of the actors."

zh: 所以观看前选择你最喜欢的电影。
en: So choose your favorite movie before watching.

zh: 然后准备好纸和笔，因为你可能想记下有用的单词或短语。
en: Then have paper and a pen ready as you may want to write down useful words or phrases.

zh: 通过这种方式，你可以增加词汇量并更好地理解对话。
en: In this way, you can increase the number of words and understand the dialogs better.

zh: 享受使用这两种方法，你一定会学得更快、做得更好！
en: Enjoy using the two ways, and you are sure to learn faster and do better!

zh: 你相信你的身体会说话吗？
en: Do you believe that your body talks?

zh: 身体语言似乎比口头或书面语言更重要。
en: Body language seems to be more important than spoken or written language.

zh: 根据爱德华·T·霍尔在印度的一项调查，在两个人的日常对话中，不到35%的意思是通过语言传达的。
en: According to a survey by Edward T. Hall in India, in a daily conversation between two persons, less than 35% of the meaning is communicated by words.

zh: 所以，至少65%的意思是通过我们的身体展示的。
en: So, at least 65% of the meaning is shown by our bodies.

zh: 根据这项调查，下面的表格展示了每个身体部位是如何交流的。
en: The following table shows how each body part communicates, according to the survey.

zh: 简，你为什么不开心？
en: Jane, why are you unhappy?

zh: 因为我昨晚不被允许玩电脑游戏。
en: Because I was not allowed to play computer games last night.

zh: 如果你花太多时间在它们上面，对你的健康有害。
en: It's bad for your health if you spend too much time on them.

zh: 一个模型火箭！谁做的？
en: A model rocket! Who made it?

zh: 是我做的。
en: It was made by me.

zh: 哇！它是什么做的？
en: Wow! What's it made of?

zh: 你知道火箭是用来做什么的吗？
en: Do you know what a rocket is used for?

zh: 当然。它是用来把卫星或宇宙飞船送入太空的。
en: Sure. It's used for sending satellites or spaceships into space.

zh: 我从布朗先生那里学到了很多关于宇宙飞船的知识，然后我做了这个模型火箭。
en: I've learned a lot about spaceships from Mr. Brown and then I made this model rocket.

zh: 我希望有一天我能进入太空。
en: I wish I could go into space some day.

zh: 我希望你的梦想会实现。
en: I hope your dream will come true.

zh: 关注交流中的意义。
en: Focus on the meaning in communication.

zh: 不要害怕犯错。
en: Don't be afraid of making mistakes.

zh: 这把锁是什么做的？
en: What's the lock made of?

zh: 它是用来锁门的。
en: It's used for locking the door.

zh: 纸是什么做的？
en: What's the paper made from?

zh: 它是用来在上面书写的。
en: It's used for writing on.

zh: 笔记本电脑是什么做的？
en: What is a laptop made of?

zh: 它是塑料做的。
en: It is made of plastic.

zh: 它是用来做什么的？
en: What is it used for?

zh: 它是用来学习的。
en: It is used for studying.

zh: 它是什么时候在哪里被研发的？
en: When and where was it developed?

zh: 它是1985年在日本被研发的。
en: It was developed in Japan in 1985.

zh: 是的。它被世界各地的人们广泛使用。
en: Yeah. It is widely used by people everywhere.

zh: 你知道它是什么时候发明的吗？
en: Do you know when it was invented?

zh: 它发明于1879年。
en: It was invented in 1879.

zh: 据说他一生中发明了两千多种东西。
en: It's said that he invented more than two thousand things during his life.

zh: 收音机由古列尔莫·马可尼在1895年发明。
en: The radio was invented by Guglielmo Marconi in 1895.

zh: 简，我们走这边。
en: Jane, let's go this way.

zh: 看！一架飞机，但它和现在的不同。
en: Look! An airplane, but it's different from today's.

zh: 是的。它由威尔伯·莱特和奥维尔·莱特在1903年发明。
en: Yes. It was invented by Wilbur and Orville Wright in 1903.

zh: 发明可能是一种新产品或一种做事的新方法。
en: An invention may be a new product or a new way of doing things.

zh: 发明以多种方式产生。
en: Inventions come about in many ways.

zh: 大多数时候，发明的出现是因为有人致力于解决问题。
en: Most of the time, inventions happen because someone works to solve a problem.

zh: 有时发明是偶然的结果。
en: Sometimes inventions are the result of accidents.

zh: 你有铅笔、钢笔、蜡笔、尺子和一些书。
en: You have pencils, pens, crayons, rulers and some books.

zh: 这些东西都不是在田里种植的。
en: None of these things was planted in fields.

zh: 它们是在工厂里制造的，是由某人发明的。
en: They were made in factories and invented by someone.

zh: 发明既有趣又令人兴奋，每个人都可以成为发明家。
en: Inventing is interesting and exciting and everyone can be an inventor.

zh: 你想成为发明家吗？
en: Do you want to be an inventor?

zh: 在发明过程中，有几个简单的步骤需要遵循。
en: There are a few simple steps to follow in the invention process.

zh: 你可以有疯狂和古怪的想法。
en: You can have wild and crazy thoughts.

zh: 记住，没有哪个想法是太愚蠢的。
en: Remember that no idea is too silly.

zh: 许多人嘲笑莱特兄弟，说他们永远飞不起来。
en: Many people laughed at the Wright brothers and said they would never fly.

zh: 但他们并没有因为人们的话而气馁。
en: But they weren't discouraged by what people said.

zh: 这就是为什么现在我们有了飞机。
en: That's why now we have planes.

zh: 在发明过程中，仔细的计划很重要。
en: Careful planning is important in the invention process.

zh: 这是进行头脑风暴以获取想法并对其进行评估的时候。
en: This is the time to brainstorm for ideas and to evaluate them.

zh: 为你的发明制作一张详细的图纸，以便其他人理解你的发明是如何工作的。
en: Make a detailed drawing of your invention so others will understand how your invention works.

zh: 制作一个你的发明模型。
en: Make a model of your invention.

zh: 看看你的发明是否按计划工作。
en: See if your invention works as it is planned.

zh: 如果没有，做更多的研究，重新设计它，并再次测试它。
en: If not, do more research, redesign it, and test it again.

zh: 每个发明都需要一个名字。
en: Every invention needs a name.

zh: 与他人分享你的发明。
en: Share your inventions with others.

zh: 在写作之前，更清晰地思考并描述一个物体的外观、用途、优点和缺点。
en: Before writing, think more clearly and tell about the looks, uses, advantages and disadvantages of an object.

zh: 我认为零是最重要的发明。
en: I think zero is the most important invention.

zh: 据说它是由一个印度人发明的。
en: It is said that it was invented by an Indian.

zh: 它是一个非常有趣的数字。
en: It is a very interesting number.

zh: 例如，我只有十元钱。
en: For example, I have only ten yuan.

zh: 如果你在它后面为我加五个零，哈哈，我就会变成一个富人。
en: If you add five zeros after it for me, haha, I will be a rich man.

zh: 我们在哪里？这是我们很久以前首次探索世界时的一个大问题。
en: Where are we? That was a big question when we first explored our world long ago.

zh: 早期的探险家发现天空中的星星是很好的导向标记。
en: The early explorers found that the stars in the sky were good guiding marks.

zh: 利用星星，他们可以找出自己所在的位置以及前进的方向。
en: Using the stars, they could find out where they were and in which direction they were going.

zh: 只要天气良好且能看到星星，这种方法在夜间就很有效。
en: This method worked well at night as long as the weather was good and the stars could be seen.

zh: 但在其他时间，它的效果就不那么好了。
en: But it didn't work so well during the rest of the time.

zh: 如今，这个问题已被全球定位系统（GPS）解决了。
en: Today, the problem has been solved by the Global Positioning System(GPS).

zh: 它就像一颗人造星星。
en: It is like a man-made star.

zh: 我们可以在任何时间、任何地点和任何天气下使用它来找出我们的位置。
en: We can use it at any time, in any place and in any weather to find out our position.

zh: 它也可以被用来研究地球的形状。
en: It can also be used to study the shape of the earth.

zh: GPS是一项伟大的发明，它帮助我们探索我们的星球并发现我们所在的位置。
en: The GPS is a great invention that helps us explore our planet and discover where we are.

zh: 我对未来将被发现的事物感到兴奋。
en: I'm excited about the things that will be discovered in the future.

zh: 嗨，玛丽亚！今晚将上映一部精彩的电影。
en: Hi, Maria! A wonderful movie will be shown tonight.

zh: 我们去看好吗？
en: Shall we go to watch it?

zh: 它是关于太空生活的。
en: It's about life in space.

zh: 是的。在电影中，所有人都乘宇宙飞船旅行，他们可以参观像火星这样的行星。
en: Yes. All the people travel by spaceship in the movie, and they can visit planets like Mars.

zh: 真的吗？康康，你认为人们将来会住在火星上吗？
en: Really? Kangkang, do you think people will live on Mars in the future?

zh: 是的。我认为有一天我们将生活在太空中。
en: Yes. I think we will live in space one day.

zh: 房屋、学校和医院将建在火星上。
en: Houses, schools and hospitals will be built on Mars.

zh: 我们将能够做任何在地球上可以做的事情。
en: We will be able to do anything that can be done on the earth.

zh: 真有趣！我等不及了。
en: What fun! I can't wait.

zh: 如果在听力中跟不上某个点，只需记下关键词。
en: If you can't follow a certain point in listening, just write down the key words.

zh: 你相信有外星人吗？
en: Do you believe there are aliens?

zh: 但一些科学家认为有外星人。
en: But some scientists think there are aliens.

zh: 一位美国科学家认为他们已经访问过我们，并且正在阅读信息以了解人类文化。
en: One American scientist thinks they have already visited us, and they are reading information in order to learn about human culture.

zh: 外星人被许多人描述和讨论。
en: Aliens are described and discussed by many people.

zh: 但我不认为外星人存在于太空中。
en: But I don't think aliens exist in space.

zh: 除非我亲眼看到外星人，否则我不会相信有外星人。
en: I won't believe there are aliens until I see them with my own eyes.

zh: 来自中国、美国和俄罗斯的宇航员将进入太空并发现关于火星的新事物。
en: Astronauts from China, the United States and Russia will travel into space and discover something new about Mars.

zh: 我长大后想成为一名宇航员。
en: I'd like to be an astronaut when I grow up.

zh: 然而，我认为你应该先掌握一些基本的计算机技能。
en: However, I think you should first master some basic computer skills.

zh: 玛丽亚，你打算成为什么？
en: Maria, what are you going to be?

zh: 嗯，我不确定。
en: Mm, I am not sure.

zh: 有时我想成为一名舞蹈演员，但我想我将来会成为一名科学家。
en: Sometimes I want to be a dancer, but I think I'm going to be a scientist in the future.

zh: 我觉得你跳舞跳得很好。
en: I think you dance very well.

zh: 是的，我确信我将来能在舞台上表演芭蕾舞。
en: Yes, I'm sure I can perform ballet on the stage in the future.

zh: 但与舞蹈相比，我更喜欢科学。
en: But I prefer science to dance.

zh: 这是我在学校最喜欢的科目。
en: It is my favorite subject in school.

zh: 我对未来将被发现的事物感到兴奋。
en: I'm excited about the things that will be discovered in the future.

zh: 那么我们的梦想就会实现。
en: Then our dreams will be realized.

zh: 提到了多少种形状的不明飞行物？
en: How many shapes of UFOs were mentioned?

zh: 不明飞行物经常出现在中国的哪个地区？
en: In which area of China did the UFOs often appear?

zh: 为什么人们对不明飞行物知之甚少？
en: Why do people know little about UFOs?

zh: A: 文章说在不久的将来，房子将会建在海底。
en: A: The 'article 'says the 'houses will be built under the 'sea in the near 'future.

zh: B: 住在海底真的很酷。
en: B: It's really 'cool to 'live under the 'sea.

zh: A: 你能相信吗？我们的汽车将来会被机器人驾驶？
en: A: Can you 'believe it? Our 'car will be driven by 'robots in the 'future?

zh: A: 你听到电视上的新闻了吗？宇宙中将会发现更多的行星。
en: A: Have you 'heard the 'news on 'TV? More 'planets will be found in the 'universe.

zh: B: 不，我没有。我认为我们的大多数梦想将来都会实现。
en: B: 'No, I haven't. I think 'most of our 'dreams will come true in the 'future.

zh: A: 蛋糕怎么样了，简？
en: A: 'How is the 'cake, 'Jane?

zh: B: 等一下。它很快就会完成。
en: B: 'Just a 'minute. It will be 'finished 'very 'soon.

zh: 火星是太阳系中离太阳第四近的行星，以罗马战神玛尔斯命名。
en: Mars is the fourth planet from the sun in our solar system and is named after Mars, the Roman god of war.

zh: 它的直径是地球直径的53%。
en: Its diameter is 53% as wide as that of the earth.

zh: 火星围绕太阳运行，距离约为2.28亿公里。
en: Mars goes around the sun at a distance of about 228 million kilometers.

zh: 你能分辨出哪颗行星是火星，因为它在夜空中是鲜红色的。
en: You can tell which planet is Mars because it is bright red in the night sky.

zh: 它看起来像一个红橙色的球。
en: It looks like a red and orange ball.

zh: 但在春季和夏季，火星表面被强烈的风暴所覆盖。
en: But during spring and summer, the surface of Mars is covered by strong storms.

zh: 火星表面的重力大约是地球重力的五分之二。
en: The gravity on the surface of Mars is about two-fifths as strong as it is on Earth.

zh: 所以一个在地球上重90公斤的人在火星上只有36公斤重。
en: So a person who weighs 90 kilos on Earth weighs only 36 kilos on Mars.

zh: 火星上的温度在零下138摄氏度到28摄氏度之间。
en: The temperature on Mars is between -138℃ and 28℃.

zh: 空气中只有0.13%的氧气。
en: The air has only 0.13% oxygen.

zh: 当两颗行星距离最近时，宇宙飞船从地球到达火星大约需要八个月。
en: It takes a spaceship about eight months to reach Mars from the earth when the two planets are closest to each other.

zh: 科学家们仍在寻找更多关于火星的信息。
en: Scientists are still searching for more information about Mars.

zh: 我们登陆火星已经两天了。
en: It has been two days since we landed on Mars.

zh: 我们花了两年多的时间才到达这里。
en: It took us more than two years to get here.

zh: 总的来说，旅程很顺利，但旅途中的生活条件相当糟糕。
en: Generally, the journey went well, but the living conditions were quite bad during the journey.

zh: 我们不得不在飞船里生产大部分食物。
en: We had to produce most of the food in the spaceship.

zh: 更糟糕的是，我们的水供应非常少。
en: What's worse, our water supplies were very low.

zh: 在那些日子里，我们不得不限制用水。
en: We had to limit the use of water during those days.

zh: 所以我们每六周洗一次澡。
en: So we had a shower every six weeks.

zh: 我们将在火星上再度过七百六十三天。
en: We will spend another seven hundred and sixty-three days on Mars.

zh: 我经常想念家人，但在火星上的兴奋是值得的！
en: I often miss the family, but the excitement of being on Mars is worth it!

zh: 科学家认为地球上的生命已经存在了数百万年。
en: Scientists think that there has been life on Earth for millions of years.

zh: 然而，我们还没有在其他星球上发现生命。
en: However, we haven't found life on other planets yet.

zh: 地球是一颗行星，它围绕太阳运转。
en: The earth is a planet and it goes around the sun.

zh: 还有另外七颗行星也围绕太阳运转。
en: And there are seven other planets that also go around the sun.

zh: 太阳及其行星被称为太阳系。
en: The sun and its planets are called the solar system.

zh: 太阳系是宇宙的一小部分。
en: The solar system is a small part of the universe.

zh: 科学家已经发射了许多宇宙飞船去探索太阳系中的其他行星。
en: Scientists have launched many spaceships to explore other planets in the solar system.

zh: 一些宇宙飞船已经飞出了太阳系。
en: Some spaceships have gone beyond the solar system.

zh: 然而，还没有人在太空中发现任何生命。
en: However, no one has discovered any life in space yet.

zh: 为什么没有来自其他星球的人给我们发送信息？
en: Why has no one from other planets sent us a message?

zh: 他们尝试过向我们发送信息吗？
en: Have they tried to send information to us?

zh: 太空中有如此多的星星，我们是孤独的，还是太空中其他星球上存在生命？
en: With so many stars in space, are we alone, or is there life on other planets in space?

zh: 康康，谁是第一个进入太空的中国人？
en: Kangkang, who is the first Chinese to travel into space?

zh: 他是我们的民族英雄，2003年乘坐神舟五号绕地球飞行了21个小时。
en: He is our national hero who traveled around the earth in Shenzhou V for 21 hours in 2003.

zh: 中国是第三个将人送入太空的国家。
en: China is the third nation that sent a person into space.

zh: 太棒了！你们所有人一定非常自豪。
en: Wonderful! All of you must be very proud.

zh: 而且，我们在过去几年里还发射了另外四艘宇宙飞船。
en: What's more, we have launched another four spaceships in the past few years.

zh: 那太棒了！这证明中国在航天工业方面取得了巨大进步。
en: That's great! It proves that China has made great progress in its space industry.

zh: 我确信中国将会向太空发射更多的宇宙飞船。
en: I'm sure that China will send more spaceships into space.

zh: 看，好大一群人！
en: Look, what a large crowd!

zh: 它是作为中国第一个月球探测器发射的宇宙飞船。
en: It's a spaceship which was launched as China's first lunar probe.

zh: 我希望有一天我能去月球旅行。
en: I hope I can travel to the moon one day.

zh: 我认为你的梦想将来会实现的。
en: I think your dream will be realized in the future.

zh: 布朗先生，您能告诉我一些最近的宇宙飞船发展吗？
en: Mr. Brown, could you please tell me some recent spaceship developments?

zh: 好的。现在主要使用电子控制的宇宙飞船过去是由宇航员控制的。
en: OK. Spaceships which now mainly use electronic controls used to be controlled by astronauts.

zh: 但它们是如何工作的呢？
en: But how do they work?

zh: 宇航员使用计算机控制宇宙飞船的速度和方向，甚至温度。
en: Astronauts use computers to control the speed and direction of their spaceships, even the temperature.

zh: 太完美了！但我对计算机技术知之甚少。
en: Perfect! But I know so little about computer technology.

zh: 掌握计算机技术很重要。
en: It's important to master computer technology.

zh: 所以我建议你探索新的方法，让计算机更好地为我们服务。
en: So I advise you to discover new ways to make computers serve us better.

zh: 好主意。谢谢您的介绍，布朗先生。
en: Good idea. Thanks for your introduction, Mr. Brown.

zh: 我认为如果我努力工作，那么没有什么是不可能的。
en: I think that if I work hard then nothing is impossible.

zh: 中国是第三个将人送入太空的国家。
en: China is the third nation that sent a person into space.

zh: 杨利伟是我们的民族英雄，他于2003年乘坐神舟五号绕地球飞行了21小时。
en: Yang Liwei is our national hero who traveled around the earth in Shenzhou V for 21 hours in 2003.

zh: 使用电子控制的宇宙飞船过去是由宇航员控制的。
en: Spaceships which use electronic controls used to be controlled by astronauts.

zh: 嫦娥一号是一艘作为中国首个月球探测器发射的宇宙飞船。
en: Chang'e I is a spaceship which was launched as China's first lunar probe.

zh: 越来越多的人拥有用于搜索信息和看电影的个人电脑。
en: More and more people have personal computers that are used to search for information and watch movies.

zh: 自从20世纪50年代计算机在美国发明以来，它们已经在工作和休闲的许多领域变得非常重要。
en: Since computers were invented in the USA in the 1950s, they have become very important in many areas of work and leisure.

zh: 毫无疑问，计算机在技术和商业中非常有用。
en: There is no doubt that computers are very useful in technology and business.

zh: 在太空中，计算机被用来控制宇宙飞船的速度和方向。
en: In space, computers have been used to control the speed and direction of a spaceship.

zh: 在计算机的帮助下，医生可以轻松发现疾病并解决其他问题。
en: With the help of computers, doctors can find diseases easily and solve other problems.

zh: 例如，植入患者体内的微型计算机可以保持他们的心脏正常跳动。
en: For example, tiny computers which are inside patients' bodies can keep their hearts beating normally.

zh: 在工厂里，机器人由像人脑一样的计算机控制。
en: In factories, robots are controlled by computers that are like human brains.

zh: 它们可以做对人类危险的工作。
en: They can do work that is dangerous to humans.

zh: 在商业中，计算机被用来下订单和取消订单。
en: In business, computers are used to place and cancel orders.

zh: 它们也使工作场所更安全、更好。
en: They are also making the workplace safer and better.

zh: 自从互联网出现以来，人们的家庭生活也发生了变化。
en: Since the internet came into being, people's lives at home have been changed, too.

zh: 越来越多的人拥有个人电脑，用来搜索信息和看电影。
en: More and more people have personal computers that are used to search for information and watch movies.

zh: 多亏了互联网，人们可以在家购物和做生意。
en: Thanks to the internet, people can do shopping and do business at home.

zh: 人们不再在纸上写信，而是通过发送电子邮件和在线聊天来交流。
en: Instead of writing letters on paper, people communicate by sending e-mails and chatting online.

zh: 整个世界都连接在一起。
en: The whole world is connected.

zh: 互联网正在使世界变得更小，像一个村庄。
en: The internet is making the world smaller, like a village.

zh: 计算机改善了我们的生活，但也带来了问题。
en: Computers have improved our lives, but they have brought problems, too.

zh: 例如，如果我们在电脑前工作太久，我们可能会头痛或眼睛酸痛，并且我们没有足够的时间学习或锻炼。
en: For instance, if we work on computers too long, we may get headaches or sore eyes, and we won't have enough time to study or exercise.

zh: 此外，并非互联网上的所有信息都是有用或正确的。
en: Besides, not all the information on the internet is useful or correct.

zh: 我们的未来会是什么样子？没有人确切知道，但大多数人认为机器人将成为我们生活的一部分。
en: What will our future be like? No one knows for certain, but most people think that robots will be part of our lives.

zh: 它们会是友好的还是不友好的？
en: Will they be friendly or unfriendly?

zh: 到目前为止，机器人没有给我们带来任何问题。
en: So far, robots haven't caused us any problems.

zh: 它们一直像仆人一样为我们工作。
en: They work for us like servants all the time.

zh: 它们帮助我们做危险和困难的工作。
en: They help us do dangerous and difficult work.

zh: 人们对机器人的快速发展感到惊讶。
en: People are surprised at the rapid development of robots.

zh: 几年后，也许机器人将能够独立思考，就像人们用自己的大脑并为自己行动一样。
en: In a few years, perhaps robots will think on their own, just as people use their brains and act for themselves.

zh: 然而，一旦机器人能够为自己思考，问题可能会出现。
en: However, once robots can think for themselves, problems may appear.

zh: 一位科学家警告说，如果机器人开始为自己思考，它们将不再想成为我们的仆人。
en: One scientist warns that if robots start to think for themselves, they will no longer want to be our servants.

zh: 他是我们的民族英雄，2003年乘坐神舟五号绕地球飞行了21个小时。
en: He is our national hero who traveled around the earth in Shenzhou V for 21 hours in 2003.

zh: 中国是第三个将人送入太空的国家。
en: China is the third nation that sent a person into space.

zh: 越来越多的人拥有个人电脑，这些电脑被用来搜索信息和看电影。
en: More and more people have personal computers that are used to search for information and watch movies.

zh: 你们所有人一定非常自豪。
en: All of you must be very proud.

zh: 这证明中国在航天工业方面取得了巨大进步。
en: It proves that China has made great progress in its space industry.

zh: 毫无疑问，计算机在技术和商业中非常有用。
en: There is no doubt that computers are very useful in technology and business.

zh: 互联网正在使世界变得更小，像一个村庄。
en: The internet is making the world smaller, like a village.

zh: 计算机在工作和家庭中帮助我们，但它们必须被正确使用。
en: Computers help us at work and at home, but they must be used properly.

zh: 项目想要成为我们的仆人，而是我们的主人。
en: Project want to be our servants, but our masters.

zh: 科学家还警告说，如果我们幸运的话，它们可能会像我们现在对待宠物一样对待我们；如果我们不幸运，谁知道会发生什么？
en: The scientist also warns that if we are lucky, they might treat us as we now treat our pets; if we are not lucky, who knows what will happen?

zh: 也许人类和机器人之间会爆发一场战争。
en: Perhaps there will be a war between human beings and robots.

zh: 一名法国学生去伦敦度假。
en: A French student went to London on vacation.

zh: 他想：“我懂一点英语。
en: He thought, "I know a little English.

zh: 一天早上，他去了一家餐馆，在桌边坐了下来。
en: One morning, he went to a restaurant and sat down at the table.

zh: 很快女服务员来到他身边。
en: Soon the waitress came to him.

zh: “先生，需要帮忙吗？”女服务员问道。
en: "Can I help you, sir?" asked the waitress.

zh: “我想要一杯茶和......”他想不起英语单词“鸡蛋”了。
en: "I'd like a cup of tea and..." He could not remember the English word "egg".

zh: 他环顾四周，但没人在吃鸡蛋。
en: He looked around, but nobody was eating eggs.

zh: 然后他看见旁边桌上有本杂志。
