en: Then he saw a magazine on the table next to him.

zh: 它的封面上有一张公鸡的图片。
en: There was a picture of a rooster on its cover.

zh: “这个用英语叫什么？”学生问道。
en: "What's the English for this?" the student asked.

zh: “你们怎么称呼公鸡的妻子？”
en: "What do you call a rooster's wife?"

zh: “母鸡，先生，”女服务员回答。
en: "A hen, sir," answered the waitress.

zh: “那你们怎么称呼母鸡的孩子？”
en: "And what do you call a hen's children?"

zh: “您是说小鸡吗，先生？”
en: "Do you mean chicks, sir?"

zh: 在小鸡出生之前，你们怎么称呼它们？”
en: Before chicks are born, what do you call them?"

zh: 请给我拿两个鸡蛋和一杯茶。”
en: Bring me two eggs and a cup of tea, please."

zh: 他向后靠去，脸上露出了微笑。
en: He sat back with a smile on his face.

zh: 汤姆，你今天为什么不开心？
en: Why are you unhappy today, Tom?

zh: 对我来说学英语很难。
en: It's hard for me to learn English.

zh: 是的，我很乐意。你有什么问题？
en: Yes, I'd love to. What's your problem?

zh: 别害羞。你应该勇敢并相信自己。
en: Don't be shy. You should be brave and believe in yourself.

zh: 你可以经常去英语角练习你的英语口语。
en: You can often go to the English Corner to practice your oral English.

zh: 一旦你大声说出你所学的东西，你就不会轻易忘记它。
en: Once you say out loud what you learn, you won't easily forget it.

zh: 真的吗？我会试试那个方法。
en: Really? I'll try that way.

zh: 我经常读英语故事和小说。
en: I often read English stories and novels.

zh: 它们不仅提高了我的阅读能力，还扩大了我的词汇量。
en: They not only improve my reading but also enlarge my vocabulary.

zh: 阅读是学好英语的一个重要方法。
en: Reading is an important way to learn English well.

zh: 振作起来。你能做好的。
en: Cheer up. You can do a good job.

zh: 好的，我会照你说的做，永不放弃。
en: OK, I'll do as you said and never give up.

zh: 英语中有许多从法语借用的词汇。
en: There are many words in the English language that have been borrowed from the French language.

zh: 有些词在英语中非常常见，以至于人们认为它们就是英语单词。
en: Some of the words are so common in English that people think they are English words.

zh: 这些词在全世界的英语中使用，而不仅仅是在英语和法语并用的加拿大。
en: These words are used in English around the world, not just in Canada where English and French are used side by side.

zh: 这类词的一个例子是'fiancé'（未婚夫）。
en: An example of this sort of word is 'fiancé' (/finseI/).

zh: 它指的是一个女人同意与之结婚的男人。
en: It means the man that a woman has agreed to marry.

zh: 另一个例子是'bouquet'（花束）这个词。
en: Another example is the word 'bouquet' (/bKkeI/).

zh: 它的意思是一束切花。
en: It means a bunch of cut flowers.

zh: 英语因为借用了一些法语词汇而变得更有趣。
en: The English language has become more interesting because it has borrowed some French words.

zh: 你去了哪里，简？
en: — Where have you been, Jane?

zh: 我和我的父母去了黄山。
en: — I have been to Mount Huang with my parents.

zh: 她去古巴当志愿者了......
en: She has gone to Cuba to be a volunteer...

zh: 你在暑假参加了一些志愿者活动，是吗？
en: You took part in some volunteer activities during the summer holidays, didn't you?

zh: 虽然我没有时间去旅行，但我仍然感到很开心。
en: Though I had no time to travel, I still felt very happy.

zh: 人们主要通过信件或电报与远方的亲戚朋友保持联系。
en: People kept in touch with their friends and relatives far away mainly by letter or telegram.

zh: 我已经和大学时的大多数朋友失去了联系。
en: I've lost touch with most of my friends in college.

zh: 休闲活动是人们不上班或不上学的时候用以放松和自娱的活动。
en: Leisure activities are the kinds of things people like to do to relax and enjoy themselves when they are not working or going to school.

zh: 很多人待在家里休息、看书和看电视。
en: Many people stay at home having a rest, reading books and watching TV.

zh: 我真的不喜欢去那种地方。
en: I really don't like going to a place like that.

zh: 它（世界人口）在以每年八千两百万的幅度增长。
en: And it is increasing by 82 million every year.

zh: 报纸上还说随着人口的增长，将会有更多的污染和其他严重的问题。
en: It also says that as the population increases, there will be more pollution and other serious problems.

zh: 只有通过合作，我们才能创造更好的未来。
en: Only by working together can we create a better future.

zh: 庞大的人口有助于这些国家的发展，但是也造成了一些严重的问题。
en: The large populations have helped them develop, but have caused them some serious problems as well.

zh: 并且更糟糕的是，找工作对于很多人来说是困难的。
en: And what was worse, it was difficult for lots of people to find jobs.

zh: 噪音打扰邻居。更糟糕的是，它对我们的健康有害。
en: Noise disturbs the neighbors. What's worse, it's harmful for our health.

zh: 我住在中国重庆一个叫绿森林的小山村。
en: I live in a small mountain village called Green Forest in Chongqing, China.

zh: 小村庄四周绿树环绕。
en: The small village is surrounded by trees.

zh: 那座城市四面环山。
en: The city is surrounded by mountains.

zh: 你在纽约已很长时间了。
en: You have been in New York for a long time.

zh: 他已经在这家公司三年了。
en: He has been in this company for three years.

zh: 我已经到这儿几天了。
en: I have been here for a few days.

zh: 实际上，这是个居住的好地方。
en: As a matter of fact, it's a wonderful place to live.

zh: 我没有可以交谈的朋友。
en: I have no friends to talk with.

zh: 到达纽约两天后，我找到了住的地方。
en: Two days after I arrived in New York, I found a place to live.

zh: 他们一旦发现有人身处困境，就选定适当的方式来帮助他们。
en: Once they find people in need, they decide on suitable ways to offer them help.

zh: 我们正在为贫困儿童募捐。
en: We are collecting money for children in need.

zh: 尽管世界上大多数人都珍视他们的家，但是每个国家却总有很多无家可归的人。
en: While most people around the world value their homes, there are many people in every country who are homeless.

zh: 我们必须关心无家可归的人，而不是仅仅把无家可归视为（社会）问题。
en: We must think of the homeless as people, not just as problems.

zh: 我把这个地方当成了家。
en: I think of this place as my home.

zh: 到2012年，希望工程筹集的资金已有87.3亿元。
en: By 2012, Project Hope had raised 8.73 billion yuan.

zh: 污染已经造成了太多问题。
en: Pollution has caused too many problems.

zh: 噢，康康。我很好。我咳嗽得少了。
en: Oh, Kangkang. I'm OK. I have coughed less.

zh: 挺好的。自从我们上次见面以来，我就一直比较忙。
en: Good. I have been busy since we met last time.

zh: 然而，并非所有的人都知道噪音也是一种污染，而且也会对人类健康造成危害。
en: However, not all people know noise is also a kind of pollution and is harmful to humans' health.

zh: 据报道，近来许多美国青少年的听力几乎和65岁老人的听力一样差，这是因为这些年轻人总听劲爆的流行音乐。
en: Recently, it was reported that many teenagers in America can hear no better than 65-year-old people do, because these young people always listen to loud pop music.

zh: 为解决这些问题采取了什么措施？
en: What has been done to solve these problems?

zh: 在地里，农民使用了太多对土壤起破坏作用的化肥和农药。
en: In the fields, farmers used too many chemicals which destroyed the soil.

zh: 森林可以贮存大量的水分。
en: And a lot of water can be saved by forests.

zh: 每个人都应该关爱野生动物，并且多种树。
en: Everyone should care for wild animals and plant more trees.

zh: 我们应该尽一切努力保护环境。
en: We should do everything we can to protect the environment.

zh: 破坏规则的......将会受到惩罚。
en: Who breaks the rules will be punished.

zh: 我们做的一些事情对地球有益，而另一些是有害的。
en: Something we have done are very good for the earth while others are bad.

zh: 嗯，我的主要工作是帮助宣传一些环保方面的知识。
en: Well, my main job is to help spread the message about protecting the environment.

zh: 例如，减少使用、再次使用和回收再利用垃圾是十分重要的。
en: For example, it's important to reduce, reuse and recycle the litter.

zh: 这是一种保护我们地球免于污染的好方法。
en: It is a good way to protect our earth from pollution.

zh: 因为这些电车不需要汽油，所以它们对环境更好，并且让出行更加环保。
en: Since these vehicles don't need petrol, they are better for the environment and make transportation cleaner.

zh: 甚至德国专家们对中国的高铁技术大加称赞。
en: Even German experts thought highly of the technology of China's high-speed train.

zh: 你可以把它贴在墙上。
en: You can stick it on the wall.

zh: 我想我不会用西班牙语进行长谈的。
en: I don't think I will have any long conversations in Spanish.

zh: 翻译会给你解释这个国家的文化吗？
en: Will the interpreter explain the culture of the country to you?

zh: 无论在中国还是在世界上其他国家，英语都被当作一个非常重要的学科。
en: English is regarded as a very important subject in China as well as in the rest of the world.

zh: 有些东西通常在不同的文化中有不同的含义。
en: Something usually have different meanings in different cultures.

zh: 古代的皇帝把他们自己比作龙。
en: The ancient emperors compared themselves to dragons.

zh: 在美国，电梯从“first floor（一楼）”开始。在英国，电梯从“ground floor（一楼）”开始。
en: In America an elevator starts on the first floor, but in Britain it starts on the ground floor.

zh: 你能给我们一些关于如何学好英语的建议吗？
en: Could you give us some advice on how to learn English well?

zh: 在美国，别人能听懂你说的话吗？
en: Could you make yourself understood in the USA?

zh: 但我不敢当众讲英语。
en: But I dare not speak English in public.

zh: 她什么都不敢说。
en: She doesn't dare to say anything.

zh: 你怎么敢那样对我说话！
en: How dare you speak to me like that!

zh: 有时我想要放弃。
en: At times I feel like giving up.

zh: 他不想去上班。
en: He didn't feel like going to work.

zh: 你想再喝一杯吗？
en: Do you feel like another drink?

zh: 我的英语也不好。
en: I was also weak in English.

zh: 我的理科不好。
en: I'm weak in the science subjects.

zh: 我的理科不好。
en: I'm not good at the science subjects.

zh: 思考你的答案，深呼吸并且面带微笑......
en: Think about your answer, take a deep breath and smile...

zh: 深呼吸，那样你会觉得轻松。
en: Take a deep breath, and then you will feel relaxed.

zh: 能与在座的各位交谈是我的荣幸。
en: It's an honor to talk with all of you here.

zh: 今天承蒙邀请到此，深感荣幸。
en: It is a great honor to be invited here today.

zh: 我相信只要你们坚持下去就会取得很大进步。
en: I'm sure that you will make great progress as long as you stick to them.

zh: 只要天气好我们就去。
en: We'll go as long as the weather is fine.

zh: 他答应过帮助我们，他没有失信。
en: He promised to help us and he stuck to his word.

zh: 这些年她一直坚持晨读。
en: She has stuck to reading aloud in the morning all these years.

zh: 接下来，把纸和笔准备好，因为你也许想把有用的单词或短语记下来。
en: Then have paper and a pen ready as you may want to write down useful words or phrases.

zh: 这张桌子是用木头做的。
en: The desk is made of wood.

zh: 纸是用木头做的。
en: The paper is made from wood.

zh: 这蛋糕是你妈妈做的吗？
en: Was this cake made by your mother?

zh: 这部手机是美国制造的。
en: This cell phone is made in America.

zh: 金属可以制成各种各样的物品。
en: Metal can be made into all kinds of things.

zh: 它用来向太空发射卫星或宇宙飞船。
en: It's used for sending satellites or spaceships into space.

zh: 邮票是用来寄信的。
en: Stamps are used for sending letters.

zh: 同样的语言被用来描述他的感情。
en: The same words were used to describe his feelings.

zh: 单词swim可作为名词使用。
en: "Swim" can be used as a noun.

zh: 英语老师经常使用录音机。
en: Recorders are often used by English teachers.

zh: 我梦想有一天可以遨游太空。
en: I wish I could go into space someday.

zh: 据说他（托马斯·爱迪生）一生中发明了两千多种东西。
en: It's said that he invented more than two thousand things during his life.

zh: 据说她活了100多岁。
en: It's said that she lived to be over 100.

zh: 发明有多种产生方式。
en: Inventions come about in many ways.

zh: 你能告诉我事故是怎样发生的吗？
en: Can you tell me how the accident came about?

zh: 这时你应该多想主意，并对它们进行评估。
en: This is the time to brainstorm for ideas and to evaluate them.

zh: 大家尽量动脑筋想办法。
en: Brainstorm as many ideas as possible.

zh: ......它是以罗马战神玛尔斯的名字命名的。
en: ...and is named after Mars, the Roman god of war.

zh: 他以其父亲的名字命名。
en: He was named after his father.

zh: 它的直径是地球直径的53%。
en: Its diameter is 53% as wide as that of the earth.

zh: 火星在距太阳大约228000000千米处环绕着太阳转。
en: Mars goes around the sun at a distance of about 228 million kilometers.

zh: 当两个星球（地球和火星）距离最近时，宇宙飞船从地球驶到火星要花费大约八个月的时间。
en: It takes a spaceship about eight months to reach Mars from the earth when the two planets are closest to each other.

zh: 我们登上火星已经两天了。
en: It has been two days since we landed on Mars.

zh: 一些飞船已到了太阳系以外的地方。
en: Some spaceships have gone beyond the solar system.

zh: 那证明中国已在航天事业上取得了巨大进步。
en: It proves that China has made great progress in its space industry.

zh: 毫无疑问，电脑在技术和商业领域中很有使用价值。
en: There is no doubt that computers are very useful in technology and business.

zh: 此外，我们在互联网上所读到的一切对我们来说并非都是真实或有益的。
en: Besides, not everything we read on the internet is true or good for us.

zh: 没人确切地知道（未来会是什么样），但是大多数人认为机器人将会成为我们生活的一部分。
en: No one knows for certain, but most people think that robots will be part of our lives.

zh: 他做了他所能做的一切事情逗她开心。
en: He did everything possible to make her happy.

zh: 我有重要的事要告诉你。
en: I have something important to tell you.

zh: 我已经好久没有看到他了。
en: I haven't seen him for a long time.

zh: 我去过北京。
en: I have been to Beijing.

zh: 我去年去过北京。
en: I went to Beijing last year.

zh: 2000年以来她一直住在这里。
en: She has lived here since 2000.

zh: 2000年她住在这里。
en: She lived here in 2000.

zh: 奶奶照顾小女孩。
en: Granny takes care of the girl.

zh: 小女孩由奶奶来照顾。
en: The girl is taken care of by Granny.

zh: 英语在世界上被广泛使用。
en: English is widely used around the world.

zh: 英语在世界上不被广泛使用。
en: English is not widely used around the world.

zh: 英语在世界上被广泛使用吗？
en: Is English widely used around the world?

zh: 为什么英语被广泛使用？
en: Why is English used widely?

zh: 灯泡是1879年发明的。
en: The bulb was invented in 1879.

zh: 我认为在太空中不会发现外星人。
en: I don't think aliens will be found in space.

zh: 电影何时上映？
en: When will the movie be shown?

zh: 在那儿，西班牙语是官方语言。
en: Spanish is spoken as the official language there.

zh: 它于1997年由美国科学家创建。
en: It was created by American scientists in 1997.

zh: 这个问题已经得到了解决。
en: The problem has been solved.

zh: 上周我父亲给我买了一部手机。
en: I was bought a cell phone by my father last week.

zh: 上周我父亲给我买了一部手机。
en: A cell phone was bought for me by my father last week.

zh: 这个女孩将被很好地照顾。
en: The girl will be well cared for.

zh: 他们听到隔壁房间有个女孩在唱歌。
en: They heard a girl sing in the next room.

zh: 隔壁房间有个女孩被听到在唱歌（被他们）。
en: A girl was heard to sing in the next room (by them).

zh: 他的父亲是一位老师，母亲是一位医生。
en: His father is a teacher and his mother is a doctor.

zh: 我给妹妹买了一件礼物，但是她并不喜欢。
en: I bought my sister a present, but she didn't like it.

zh: 汤姆每天都做家务活，而他的妹妹什么也不做。
en: Tom does housework every day while his sister does nothing.

zh: 你自己做这件事，或者请别人做也可以。
en: Do it yourself or ask somebody else to do it.

zh: 他要么是不能来，要么是不想来。
en: Either he could not come or he did not want to.

zh: 她的母亲病了，所以她不得不待在家里照顾她。
en: Her mother is ill, so she has to stay at home and look after her.

zh: 地面很湿，因为昨晚下雨了。
en: The ground is very wet, for it rained last night.

zh: 你读的故事是《营救》。
en: The story (that) you read is The Rescue.

zh: 笑到最后的人笑得最好。
en: He who laughs last laughs best.

zh: 昨天参观我们学校的外国人来自加拿大。
en: The foreigner who visited our school yesterday is from Canada.

zh: 我们遇到的男孩是李明的兄弟。
en: The boy (whom) we met is Li Ming's brother.

zh: 我们买的鱼不新鲜。
en: The fish which we bought were not fresh.

zh: Hang是那个母亲是我们数学老师的男孩。
en: Hang is the boy whose mother is our maths teacher.

zh: 飞机是一种能飞的机器。
en: A plane is a machine that can fly.
